name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: New Pro-Walz Group Just Launched
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_pro_walz_group_running_ads&n=1)
---
Peter \-- A new radical leftwing group just emerged in Minnesota and is already launching a massive advertising campaign promoting their hero, Tim Walz. **In fact, their first ad promoting Walz talks about how he made "Historic Investments in Minnesota's Small Businesses".** What a slap in the face to the thousands of businesses this man **destroyed** with his Unilateral Emergency Powers! **** Unfortunately, this new far-left group has some huge financial backing. It's being run by former Minneapolis Mayor RT Ryback's son. And this signals the beginning of Tim Walz' run for re-election. Can you imagine a guy who locked his citizens in their homes, shut down businesses, forced kids to wear masks and incentivized teenagers into getting an experimental drug, could be re-elected? Well that might just happen when the big money lines up behind the leader of Minnesota's COVID Cult. **_Since weakling Paul Gazelka sold out and passed Walz' budget without passing Rep Erik Mortensen's Never Again Bill, Walz is in position to declare Unilateral Emergency Powers all over again._** This is incredibly troubling since the media is selling the fear of the COVID Delta variant and Biden talked about a government program going door to door to vaccinate the population. _Action 4 Liberty was created to fight against this excessive government control and power. We go to**war on your behalf** to advance and protect liberty from tyrannical politicians._ But the evil of the modern liberal movement is getting funded and we're starting to see their lies being advertised directly to Minnesota voters.
## THIS MUST BE STOPPED!
**Action 4 Liberty invests our time and resources in young liberty professionals who are the boots on the ground across the state holding these politicians accountable. Our team works around the clock to STOP the Tim Walz train from running over all our liberties.** We need **boots on the ground** to build the political energy needed to pass important legislation like the **Never Again bill**. And we need these young fighters making calls, knocking doors and showing up around the state if we want to Stop the Walz Agenda. But we can't do it without your financial support. YOU are the reason we are able to bring the fight to them! Will you do me a favor and make a donation today! | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_pro_walz_group_running_ads&n=2 "Support Our Fight") [Support Our Fight](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_pro_walz_group_running_ads&n=2)
---
**We REFUSE to give up on this important mission, which is why we are expanding our team and building more resources for the next year. Our focus****remains strong: STOP the Walz Agenda and Pass the NEVER AGAIN BILL!**
While we continue building, we'll also work vigilantly to stop vaccine passports, Biden's door-to-door vaccination program, mask mandates and any other tyrannical government assaults on our liberties...from the halls of the Capitol down to the City Hall.
We know the Republican Establishment continues letting you down. They fight for nothing. Senate Republicans just adjourned the Special Session without firing Walz' Small Business Hitman, Jan Malcolm.
So we'll keep building a team of freedom fighters in this state that won't cower to the radical leftists like Tim Walz. We'll overpower the radical left groups emerging who are going to work with Tim Walz to lie about his record.
But we won't be able to stay in this fight without the financial backing of supporters like you.
**[Please support Action 4 Liberty with a donation of $100, $50 or $25. If you can, please consider a one-time donation of $500 or more to help us hire more young liberty professionals in Minnesota](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_pro_walz_group_running_ads&n=3).**
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_pro_walz_group_running_ads&n=4).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_pro_walz_group_running_ads&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_pro_walz_group_running_ads&n=6), software for leaders.

name: Jose Castillo
subject: Hispanics are no longer all Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE CASTILLO FOR CONGRESS
body:
I know what it’s like to live in a corrupt country, I refuse to let America become a socialist nation. News alert: Hispanics are no longer all Democrats. We left behind socialist countries and we won’t let America become a socialist nation. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=08257037c19f49c0927c493520c3f21f&_e=5ngfzJRdy8Yv_i491KYu-Z4_FC4tFbn-rgW0_HPlII-LSSqeNXIv8l0BsvwLPOES0IGMf3jUX3Ss7sVf6CDT0ZyR_9r36TgeJUwkbCVqxvUIufgdGvK1GZxFGAtTO-Ltpu_zlfLY6kfetbaJ09AMhOt9pKv4_inUIeSZCEHSRNKvWqov9BGdDLstseCOw66I0H-BxwxW5eWimdbPMcpp9sE-X5KGggCGT1z9XiMlr-cInQjHwJC_NumT3Za3ZYK7q_ARVeeKqH1JgVHNbTp50HW_m7pcIUAkxevEVvXHmc2nPUF38snLdn_7oslMXYnZBZAy7EPbQkXKm3qThvrpkczYRKTLUz1PI9sra0A5cxLPdqUy5Pyhdw7JPWvkwPzlewVLAGsIQwAat9aqAt6mZeBgq6By7dkUkuypOoaQNHR5e-DqbFHBhvIAQETbtIdEvG1PAUGzfftzO5FVgGLuoM39je_wP02_rQb2lZq4g54%3D)

---
Fellow American - - Democrats think that to be Hispanic, you must vote Blue.

We should welcome them to the 21st century because, I don’t know if you’ve heard - _but Hispanics are no longer all Democrats._

That’s right, thanks to former President Donald Trump’s common-sense policies and the liberal’s insane socialist logic, the tides are turning. **_The Democrat’s socialist agenda does not align with Hispanic’s conservative values any longer._**

Frankly, it’s racist that Democrats think that skin color has anything to do with political ideology.

You may not know me, so I want to take a minute to introduce myself. My name is Jose Castillo. I was born in New Orleans but grew up in Honduras with a strong, single mother before returning to the United States. I now live in Florida with my beautiful wife and daughter, living the American dream.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=08257037c19f49c0927c493520c3f21f&_e=5ngfzJRdy8Yv_i491KYu-Z4_FC4tFbn-rgW0_HPlII-LSSqeNXIv8l0BsvwLPOES0IGMf3jUX3Ss7sVf6CDT0ZyR_9r36TgeJUwkbCVqxvUIufgdGvK1GZxFGAtTO-Ltpu_zlfLY6kfetbaJ09AMhOt9pKv4_inUIeSZCEHSRNKvWqov9BGdDLstseCOw66I0H-BxwxW5eWimdbPMcpp9sE-X5KGggCGT1z9XiMlr-cInQjHwJC_NumT3Za3ZYK7q_ARVeeKqH1JgVHNbTp50GXPQHZtFjMANYgZM74dcskAgnUIDhIUrjNjLixZx20SRUMQKo5ptJHkmXkOuvrfJ_p2TNOg5ZfLkSPx40P3Gi1QtAhWr_SF8cG1EcEKSqsBifCTH6iz3WpSxFONyXJa7FDjj0vsIEaQKn3eC-9pAhgN_-lP_ONJG1Y9Wd9LRKQ4kLJuQoeuZ6vYZ5-aBqHO9xghK4WlwNw1H_fB-9GNK-g%3D)
_This is me during Donald Trump’s ‘Save America’ Rally in Florida in July_
After witnessing the Democrats destroy Donald Trump’s America-First agenda, I decided to run for Congress in Florida’s 9th district. I’m a pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment, and pro-America First conservative. I know what it's like to live in a corrupt country. There's a reason I left it behind - and I don't want those socialist policies to be implemented into America. [**It would be an honor if you would chip in $10 to help elect a Hispanic conservative from Florida to take on the Democrats and make Congress great again.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=08257037c19f49c0927c493520c3f21f&_e=5ngfzJRdy8Yv_i491KYu-Z4_FC4tFbn-rgW0_HPlII-LSSqeNXIv8l0BsvwLPOES0IGMf3jUX3Ss7sVf6CDT0ZyR_9r36TgeJUwkbCVqxvUIufgdGvK1GZxFGAtTO-Ltpu_zlfLY6kfetbaJ09AMhOt9pKv4_inUIeSZCEHSRNKvWqov9BGdDLstseCOw66I0H-BxwxW5eWimdbPMcpp9sE-X5KGggCGT1z9XiMlr-cInQjHwJC_NumT3Za3ZYK7q_ARVeeKqH1JgVHNbTp50DYGzS4CaeDUIuw81O8KDrmiVm697_kpUWRHhUcpb-72QtjvoOTH06_ER-9SxaNCkbLPomNCzCFR0uP8KrAGML2eNRAuiIEknKgfm1cha6BesGX9DDudtnhB3uRu-KBFptnJZe80PzF4pTTNvcyG69tqvimslQ0njufqRhl3EfmJwI27VHymL6La3tLKJ1uZXWeBf5CmvDOs7yB1IdEGEwE%3D)

[ Make Congress Great Again
Support Jose »](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=08257037c19f49c0927c493520c3f21f&_e=5ngfzJRdy8Yv_i491KYu-Z4_FC4tFbn-rgW0_HPlII-LSSqeNXIv8l0BsvwLPOES0IGMf3jUX3Ss7sVf6CDT0ZyR_9r36TgeJUwkbCVqxvUIufgdGvK1GZxFGAtTO-Ltpu_zlfLY6kfetbaJ09AMhOt9pKv4_inUIeSZCEHSRNKvWqov9BGdDLstseCOw66I0H-BxwxW5eWimdbPMcpp9sE-X5KGggCGT1z9XiMlr-cInQjHwJC_NumT3Za3ZYK7q_ARVeeKqH1JgVHNbTp50GOyi2ozOAbdKPftqnxu1w0GTTg0I_QPP3RAMJEtBtq4eRK3fpQ-PFSsm9MrI4iJ0qU3AujQ8c_aWitXAMqNJEcdusMzmvmlRH_Qu13pi1Cfp98YViT0G-6mUPInOvNL0Y62rSSbtMOCP8dYwo0Aa1h2qDZnnS00uICJxT66V8cyRw_JWQxS_44sLwO96KVMzTnJEtisTF2-AWQPd4sWC8A%3D)
Hispanics are walking away from the racist, do-nothing Democrats once and for all. Their ‘values’ do not equate to the same things we want. We want secure borders, an open economy, common-sense policies, and we strongly oppose allowing the U.S. to become a socialist nation.

**We want liberal logic out of our lives.**

Here’s the deal - Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you we have a real opportunity to unseat a Democrat and flip a blue seat RED! [**If you could chip in just $5 right now, you’ll send me to Washington to be a voice for all conservatives against the RINOs and socialist Liberals.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=08257037c19f49c0927c493520c3f21f&_e=5ngfzJRdy8Yv_i491KYu-Z4_FC4tFbn-rgW0_HPlII-LSSqeNXIv8l0BsvwLPOES0IGMf3jUX3Ss7sVf6CDT0ZyR_9r36TgeJUwkbCVqxvUIufgdGvK1GZxFGAtTO-Ltpu_zlfLY6kfetbaJ09AMhOt9pKv4_inUIeSZCEHSRNKvWqov9BGdDLstseCOw66I0H-BxwxW5eWimdbPMcpp9sE-X5KGggCGT1z9XiMlr-cInQjHwJC_NumT3Za3ZYK7q_ARVeeKqH1JgVHNbTp50HE9K_wHzSLxVawi10189pMm-Sz8sr0nym2gGVNM49kX3Qia3Jx4Sez7Bj2fTFfE2ixI-oCwD56I7RJ8cRl6nYzsMXzvp31jw5-TtXj3etIbCS7OmGe14t9jfpBwOc_4mycu34dpTOB2_Yb5bkgL4P5dZFrm_G5CFxIKgjcuhdEHJt4NTsdcUCvZrj1YMngx-vh_CZuctL-8Q0WPAzPgcCw%3D)

Thank you for your time, I look forward to fighting for our shared conservative values and making Congress GREAT (Republican) again!

God Bless,

How did ‘Big Tech’ welcome me to the political arena? Twitter to censor a picture I posted on July 4th of me saluting the American flag in my uniform | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bf0e3a12eaf54311a1e1f3206ef8c840&_e=J8loRFwJ9YtXRuuMk7x6VK8Q5w__z-9wqMLemh8qbbLy2vLU8ev87WMCcXVJ9O7jkt9DHXac6BlLIyV_qDxFGH0E6sPlHjmQG2q0CTio0YWy8URdgUY9_MQcgm6Re-6gSu8nIox7baKXy9-h_gJgmyIL3eLLLiMSiZqm2kklOZJDGSJVeTmp6Q8D0YZ8CGAjvScK7aKjtULC1HLXqkZnanyLqjvOZojLaaI8Yod-Mi8bSMhho1l0qF3rX0AoWB3tS9dziBruPCUKUbkc_Y38Vi2GovttBzgid78KA1-_JTZ0Zp2HShYznm_zYTmUdyWVx4HtIW1lp0EmvBj_W2SzmmTkGdlfhOj_13Iqlc_8qyX2HQ-sxr4m3kAG8z-5-i3_gRJDidRglZppB0lOCh1n_-9cFhqgak2xODLBn6ECkj8ENGHsIcOHjNj3l7j1GG5IFgVTH-hJuQt-Zqfl8D069Q%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

My campaign kick-off plan was focused on my career as an Army Officer serving our nation in Operation Enduring Freedom and how my service was tragically cut short when I was severely wounded and nearly killed by a roadside IED.

I wanted to talk about that even through years of painful and arduous recovery, I still found faith and hope in Jesus and my devoted family.

And finally, I wanted to finish by saying that a life of service in the Army and as a businessowner who provides support-services for wounded Veterans has prepared me to be a U.S. Senator.

Peter, my campaign is ONLY TWO DAYS OLD. Two days.

And how did 'Big Tech' welcome me to the political arena? Twitter censored a picture I posted on July 4th of me saluting the American flag in my uniform by labeling it "**sensitive content**."

[**Hey Twitter, was it my scars or the fact that I salute the flag?
Regardless, neither are going away - and neither am I.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bf0e3a12eaf54311a1e1f3206ef8c840&_e=J8loRFwJ9YtXRuuMk7x6VK8Q5w__z-9wqMLemh8qbbLy2vLU8ev87WMCcXVJ9O7jkt9DHXac6BlLIyV_qDxFGH0E6sPlHjmQG2q0CTio0YWy8URdgUY9_MQcgm6Re-6gSu8nIox7baKXy9-h_gJgmyIL3eLLLiMSiZqm2kklOZJDGSJVeTmp6Q8D0YZ8CGAjvScK7aKjtULC1HLXqkZnanyLqjvOZojLaaI8Yod-Mi8bSMhho1l0qF3rX0AoWB3tXAaqJEL6-S88sR-dlf_VsNnVaB30jJ1WshXI6YT7rUzI0AkVelB5WN81KleKBIcSZmtdeQGg9m_va2yvCI4SAnWag_7Xp-JfsV6mXSb6y3uEdLfKgDg0Ufn8CRpb_oqEVlOh1X5srEbUf2TiUqaJxKUmeN64ICBVdgxZoik6bBbtPzlHKAM2eM3V15hS23BddJprI7BkQyzWBrRTOyY02w%3D%3D) [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bf0e3a12eaf54311a1e1f3206ef8c840&_e=J8loRFwJ9YtXRuuMk7x6VK8Q5w__z-9wqMLemh8qbbLy2vLU8ev87WMCcXVJ9O7jkt9DHXac6BlLIyV_qDxFGH0E6sPlHjmQG2q0CTio0YWy8URdgUY9_MQcgm6Re-6gSu8nIox7baKXy9-h_gJgmyIL3eLLLiMSiZqm2kklOZJDGSJVeTmp6Q8D0YZ8CGAjvScK7aKjtULC1HLXqkZnanyLqjvOZojLaaI8Yod-Mi8bSMhho1l0qF3rX0AoWB3tOTWzVuAkKEQQqp7yapvhQdCCgAtgNuG_7LQ1boEYFFlbn4n-M7iASSCA03P6MKtvV5aWTvi8i0bv_GGQxdYfE8anifgIm4jQoCy9UuRR3q5fzRYF6QFOdGMipY7G3vTpfNDZjHRn_CoZQACcesUtMRyX5RLsdp0nvmQE6IXOVARgzaaZF5z9nn4eooK_PadOVlnvAbF0yU-o9EQ5UoxswQ%3D%3D)
As the Republican candidate, we’re in position to flip Nevada and take back the Senate Majority. But now we’re facing an uphill battle, __**and it’s only going to get worse from here.**__

[**That’s why I’m asking grassroots Conservatives like you to stand with me by making a small contribution**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bf0e3a12eaf54311a1e1f3206ef8c840&_e=J8loRFwJ9YtXRuuMk7x6VK8Q5w__z-9wqMLemh8qbbLy2vLU8ev87WMCcXVJ9O7jkt9DHXac6BlLIyV_qDxFGH0E6sPlHjmQG2q0CTio0YWy8URdgUY9_MQcgm6Re-6gSu8nIox7baKXy9-h_gJgmyIL3eLLLiMSiZqm2kklOZJDGSJVeTmp6Q8D0YZ8CGAjvScK7aKjtULC1HLXqkZnanyLqjvOZojLaaI8Yod-Mi8bSMhho1l0qF3rX0AoWB3t5CHZofg-LlrD4gpLjQmaimMg1M3PTKVgD98iUphHiPHOIfdHyBnBaNkNoc85GmVWdFo0VLMdOqi0MO6rTBrOWwHuv0AYi992UAcjCzxkUHS8oYWSLdYbALpJyQ0QP0m1FFWsihcHN7dRS9rR0uhp3bPjvQVCN-PzgHgfiFrYAC9yxvmp4-7h17E2t5YKbMhsjBBur5oZsv6NX7bn6Gtvqg%3D%3D), so we can circumvent the Big Tech censors and reach every voter we need to take back our Senate Majority.

| [I stand with Captain Sam Brown](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bf0e3a12eaf54311a1e1f3206ef8c840&_e=J8loRFwJ9YtXRuuMk7x6VK8Q5w__z-9wqMLemh8qbbLy2vLU8ev87WMCcXVJ9O7jkt9DHXac6BlLIyV_qDxFGH0E6sPlHjmQG2q0CTio0YWy8URdgUY9_MQcgm6Re-6gSu8nIox7baKXy9-h_gJgmyIL3eLLLiMSiZqm2kklOZJDGSJVeTmp6Q8D0YZ8CGAjvScK7aKjtULC1HLXqkZnanyLqjvOZojLaaI8Yod-Mi8bSMhho1l0qF3rX0AoWB3tw43JRPkWQSDAh8HLGsMEjXNjbraUc9G13_JTXJ-bExFVwjV3qyl_yUVjFM4YYzDhGJLObIM3gFQDaiUqaKzK_n4Pp_vAtg6fY5s3DE0nHBkpCGi6ZGA7ShRuHC6H6aaMrw9imzxr-zwsU9Om_w3QkHb06BeK85_0MYJHYjgjO2Jnxk1k1geF2mLsgLZ3wjz7ph_FHqRRDQpzFQBACR0Y2w%3D%3D)
---

And once in office, I’ll take the lead to ensure no Veteran or political candidate who wants to serve their Country is censored by Big Tech monopolies.

I’m infuriated that it’s come to this. But this has only re-affirmed my decision to run for Senate and hold the Big Tech cartel accountable. **If we win this seat, we’ll take back the Senate Majority and I'll work to finally make Silicon Valley accountable to the People.**

name: PACT
subject: WOW: Nation’s largest teachers union endorses Critical Race Theory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parents Against Critical Theory
body:
"They're not trying to educate; they're trying to indoctrinate." \- Ron DeSantis

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57900373:J6vP43lNm:m:1:3253819041:8F50A242FFED30A2019F385D0F822B6E:r)
---
Peter,

The teachers union are declaring war on our children and our country.

**[_Over the weekend, the nation's largest teachers union (the NEA) approved a plan to promote Critical Race Theory in ALL 50 states and over 14,000 local school districts._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57900373:J6vP43lNm:m:1:3253819041:8F50A242FFED30A2019F385D0F822B6E:r)**

**Eliminating CRT is THE most important issue of our time.** The leftists have control over Hollywood, higher education, and the news. If they brainwash our children with progressive propaganda, America will cease to be America.

**LOOK AT WHAT THEY ARE TEACHING KINDERGARTNERS:**

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57900373:J6vP43lNm:m:1:3253819041:8F50A242FFED30A2019F385D0F822B6E:r)
**_[Please DONATE NOW to stand with Parents Against Critical Theory as we FIGHT BACK against the Critical Race Theory and the teachers unions. We can 't do it without grassroots supporters like YOU! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57900373:J6vP43lNm:m:1:3253819041:8F50A242FFED30A2019F385D0F822B6E:r)_**

**Critical Race Theory teaches that "whiteness" is evil, that parents are "dissenters," and that ALL white people are "oppressors."**

_The Left might've gone off the rails, but we can't let them drag our children down with them._ This is more important than any election. Parents Against Critical Theory will not rest until CRT has been COMPLETELY defeated.

**But we need your help, Peter.** As we like to say, _" We're so grassroots, we need our grass-cut!"_ We truly do rely on the generosity of American Patriots like YOU.

**Will you join us and fight for objective curriculum in our children's schools?**

**[DONATE HERE to help us DEFEAT Critical Race Theory> >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57900373:J6vP43lNm:m:1:3253819041:8F50A242FFED30A2019F385D0F822B6E:r)**

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: What Tucker Carlson said, Peter…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57900870:JJEBU3lNM:m:1:3253819041:400043C37EC646303667A2C19FEA1DE0:r) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they're white they're evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they're black they're helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It 's state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn 't matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57900870:JJEBU3lNM:m:1:3253819041:400043C37EC646303667A2C19FEA1DE0:r)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won't survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. [**But there 's something you can do.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57900870:JJEBU3lNM:m:1:3253819041:400043C37EC646303667A2C19FEA1DE0:r) That's why I'm writing to you today. Because our fate isn't sealed -- yet.__But we must act now.__ My name is Ryan Girdusky and I've made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won't and take back our schools. **I 'm going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project.** But I don't stand a chance without you. [**Please donate $35 or more to the 1776 Project PAC and save our schools from race-baiting, America-hating Marxists.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57900870:JJEBU3lNM:m:1:3253819041:400043C37EC646303667A2C19FEA1DE0:r) And make no mistake -- this isn't just a California or New York problem. **Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state.** It's happening from coast to coast, in red, blue and purple states alike. And if we don't take action, we'll all pay the price. You and I have to take a stand NOW. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57900870:JJEBU3lNM:m:1:3253819041:400043C37EC646303667A2C19FEA1DE0:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57900870:JJEBU3lNM:m:1:3253819041:400043C37EC646303667A2C19FEA1DE0:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57900870:JJEBU3lNM:m:1:3253819041:400043C37EC646303667A2C19FEA1DE0:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
184 7th Ave #106, New York, NY 10011 Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee

| Friend, New Hampshire voters have TURNED on Maggie Hassan:
* **47%** of voters want to give Hassan the boot,

* Just __**39%** of voters say they support her re-election.

* (Don't forget: Maggie Hassan won in 2016 by __**_just over 1,000 votes_** _._)

Democrats like Hassan are sprinting to the left. New Hampshire voters are NOT going along for the ride. As conservatives, **this is the BEST chance we have at flipping a Democrat Senate seat in 2022** ... and **WINNING back the Senate** for the GOP. But we have to do the hard work of building a grassroots movement. **LFOD PAC is committed to building a generation movement to take back our state and send New Hampshire conservatives to Washington.[But we're only as strong as your help.](http://click.e.santosforcongressemail.com/?qs=4f36efde603066e7848cfba3b26db917d4620bbd3ecf9df313fbec4757f202b11ffed37ed02fe6d85d33706f84190ea832e30219ddb717c0 "But we’re only as strong as your help.")** **[Chip in $9 to turn this purple state RED in 2022 and 2024>>](http://click.e.santosforcongressemail.com/?qs=4f36efde603066e7a5438a46404aad879b43fba31ceb2a22eecfef22a65a6df4763ed1a811c6d62d715c033efc34a3d5f201d2857a94471c "Chip in $9 to turn this purple state RED in 2022 and 2024 >>")**

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Impeaching Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Peter --
Caving to China after they unleashed a virus
on America. . .
Hunter Biden's shady dealings. . .
The "Big Man" taking his cut. . .

Quid Pro Joe is abusing his power as
President just like he did as Vice President.
And that's exactly why I filed Articles of
Impeachment on Joe Biden.

75 million Americans are fed up with
inaction.
It's time to take a stand. Will you become a
citizen co-sponsor?

For four straight years, the Democrats and
the Fake News Media tried to impeach and remove President Trump
from office.
They put our country through hell alleging
"Russian collusion" without a shred of evidence! Nancy Pelosi's
House even voted to impeach Trump not once - but TWICE!
And when evidence came to light showing that
Joe Biden did everything the Democrats and the Fake News claimed
President Trump did, nothing happened.
Enough is enough. I'm tired of the Swampy
double standard!
Quid pro-Joe Biden abused his power as Vice
President. Americans will not tolerate this. I will NOT tolerate
it.
That's why I filed Articles of Impeachment on
Joe Biden.
I need you to join this fight: become a
Citizen Co-Sponsor by signing your "Impeach Joe Biden" petition!
After you sign, I'm asking you to please
consider going the extra mile by chipping in $100, $50, $25, $15
-- whatever you can most afford -- to the "Impeach Joe Biden
Fund" and help me build momentum across America to IMPEACH JOE
BIDEN.
The Biden Crime Family must be held
accountable.
So please, after you become a citizen
co-sponsor to impeach Joe Biden, consider donating before the
deadline.
I'll keep you updated.

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

name: Team Franchot
subject: Please take our healthcare survey
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
While our state is home to nation-leading healthcare providers, the high cost of healthcare means that far too many of our friends, family and neighbors go without the care and services they need. Hundreds of thousands of Marylanders are currently living without health insurance, and many more are underinsured, or can’t afford the cost of services or life-saving medication even with insurance. Peter Franchot believes that no family should have to choose between life-saving medicines and putting food on the table, which is why he is fighting to lower healthcare costs and expand affordable primary and preventive care for all Marylanders.
We would like to hear from you directly on this issue. Will you take our short healthcare survey to let us know how more affordable healthcare would make a difference in the lives of you and your family? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/RP-ej8qR90SASke38hcfeg2]
We’re building a people-powered movement to create a government that can tackle the kitchen-table issues for our working families, and we want to make sure that your voice is heard on the issue of affordable healthcare. The survey will only take a minute, but will provide us with important insight that will help us better serve communities under Peter Franchot’s gubernatorial administration.
Click here to take our healthcare survey. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/RP-ej8qR90SASke38hcfeg2]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em070821]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d4685daf-94de-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/eee2095a-c6e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWUyMDk1YS1jNmUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EvIbJNNhb3RV13HRCWIzoS2KInQrWoet5N1sAmmx2ss=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

Box 6648 Annapolis, MD 21401 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . name: Roy Cooper
subject: Add your name to support Medicaid expansion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I believe that health care access is a right. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32127328/294793834/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODBhYmI0NC1jN2UwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x8FcT3k96sZiowZrG-5MGU26YM48fJskLgBXnpnFzQI=&emci=6360573e-c7e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c80abb44-c7e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)
| | **Health care access is a right for all — not a privilege for those who can pay.** **_It’s time to expand Medicaid in North Carolina._ ** **[Add your name to show your support>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32127329/294793835/456964787?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODBhYmI0NC1jN2UwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x8FcT3k96sZiowZrG-5MGU26YM48fJskLgBXnpnFzQI=&emci=6360573e-c7e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c80abb44-c7e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)**
---
Peter,
I believe that North Carolina is the greatest state in the nation and the best place to live and raise a family.
But that doesn’t mean we can’t do better.
**More than a million North Carolinians still lack access to affordable health insurance — and the health care they need and deserve.**
That means having to choose between going to the doctor and buying groceries for the week. It’s deciding not to fill necessary prescriptions so you can afford to pay the rent.
Those are choices no one should ever have to make.
For too long, Republican leaders in our state legislature have blocked expanding Medicaid in North Carolina, denying access to quality health care to more than 500,000 people who need it.
[**Peter, it’s past time to expand Medicaid in North Carolina. Sign our petition right now to say you support passing the expansion >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32127330/294793836/456964787?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODBhYmI0NC1jN2UwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x8FcT3k96sZiowZrG-5MGU26YM48fJskLgBXnpnFzQI=&emci=6360573e-c7e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c80abb44-c7e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)
[ADD YOUR NAME ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32127331/294793837/456964787?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODBhYmI0NC1jN2UwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x8FcT3k96sZiowZrG-5MGU26YM48fJskLgBXnpnFzQI=&emci=6360573e-c7e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c80abb44-c7e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)

Together, we can make North Carolina a better, healthier place for all of us to live.
Thank you,
Roy

name: Greater Georgia
subject: ICYMI: GREATER GEORGIA HD34 EFFORTS FEATURED IN MARIETTA DAILY JOURNAL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, JULY 9, 2021
ICYMI: GREATER GEORGIA HD34 EFFORTS FEATURED IN MARIETTA DAILY JOURNAL
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, the Marietta Daily Journal published an article yesterday [highlighting](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BGysHwqXCmIkUa2GSTW7wxyQwBLW-FTZIx9PSyRTm3aVmEbvli8rBzJJxoJhq-_w0fkLG_ecxxnqR1Xv5IgrYWxb3ooWtMhQVJu5tH5txW_Z4sdSmB_ZmuEKoXk5cLUB2akgoHWvnqk-gUuGhqoX-BCN7vPZNqHBFwmzJOsxBxwSrIL_-c6DVLoMmSzmx0_QNsA-pTJTjAsX4EsjI_GG579hUPjGCMISgAGFr_4L_KtQ5Kun7NyV8SzdkS3PI8KbC0-LEPaC7EU7ei8APdz_uJWNdqky8PfL2KfXPiMdN5gy0TbTezvtnq7NhtB8Dkgc&c=NsJA7lIaUtjHYm03LXVKWAS2HaSZv8fDQUVamhafaFKM-WcrBuWaLQ==&ch=8kthpXbSlx8aLMgbKPBKRUfkTG6QRHDqTRvUw27YldmO2zqu9eNytw==) Greater Georgia's efforts to secure a conservative victory in the runoff election for State House District 34. The article highlights Greater Georgia's ground game, dedication, and [results](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BGysHwqXCmIkUa2GSTW7wxyQwBLW-FTZIx9PSyRTm3aVmEbvli8rB_lDtqtUL9by3QpylN4m1yNpBX4gluzXLiae9pUQemMkxXkkp_Q4Gh-eVjETWF1EFtQ_-N2heIMU8M5XqNI8NGjSio1xjbwOEzkUEJMbYkkxN-w5ACjqGcgK7QUITq8bUEj1MZrSdnqeYS10sg8N7rrlkZnMXQkFYp8JTdmm8ytrYlajbOU6QHyDGKJbHcZb0dn06ZMwbD9ntdViVhHj129sraic7O-daTYfoNAfxnBz&c=NsJA7lIaUtjHYm03LXVKWAS2HaSZv8fDQUVamhafaFKM-WcrBuWaLQ==&ch=8kthpXbSlx8aLMgbKPBKRUfkTG6QRHDqTRvUw27YldmO2zqu9eNytw==), including the thousands of voter contacts made, as well as the significant investment the organization has made in the race:
Kelly Loeffler touts her organization's work in Kennesaw Statehouse race
With major statewide elections in Georgia still over a year away, it's no wonder outside groups have taken an interest in the race for House District 34--right now, it's the only show in town.
The Stacey Abrams-backed advocacy organization and fundraising juggernaut Fair Fight Action has endorsed Democrat Priscilla Smith in the special election, now headed to a runoff on Tuesday. Across the aisle, former U.S. Sen. Kelly Loeffler, R-Georgia, is trying to prove her recently-formed Greater Georgia group can make a splash by helping Republican Devan Seabaugh across the finish line.
Seabaugh, a Metro Atlanta Ambulance executive, finished with 3,337 votes, or 47.1% in the first round of voting on June 15. Smith, an activist, artist and former educator, came in second place with 1,740 votes, or 24.6%.
The race was a so-called 'jungle primary,' with five candidates--two Democrats, two Republicans, and one Libertarian--on the ballot. No candidate earned the required outright majority of the vote to avoid a runoff. While Seabaugh and his Republican counterpart, David Blinkhorn, combined for over 60% of the vote in the once firmly Republican district, Democrats have made steady gains over recent election cycles.
Loeffler has not shied away from comparisons between her group and Abrams'. Allowing Fair Fight has been "very effective," the former senator said this week she wants to break its "monopoly on voter mobilization."
To those ends, Greater Georgia has now spent over $100,000 on the special election, a spokesperson for the organization said.
Neither Smith nor Fair Fight responded to requests for comment from the MDJ before press time, but the organization and Abrams have highlighted Smith's candidacy and encouraged support for her on social media. Fair Fight CEO Lauren Groh-Wargo was also among Smith's campaign donors in a June financial disclosure report.
In a recorded message, Abrams called Smith a "tireless advocate for underrepresented communities," who will "fight to protect our nation's democracy by working to put an end to attacks on Georgians' freedom to vote."
Cobb GOP Chair Salleigh Grubbs attributed the big spending on the race to it being the first election since the "disasters" of November and January.
"More people are awake, more people are paying attention," Grubbs said, adding Greater Georgia's offerings for the Cobb GOP have primarily been in volunteer training and resources.
Loeffler told the MDJ her organization has mailed over 1,500 postcards, knocked over 3,000 doors, and identified about 1,600 unregistered conservative voters in House District 34, which covers parts of Marietta and Kennesaw. She couldn't say how many of those 1,600 voters Greater Georgia had reached, or registered, but said the group has registered "thousands" of new Republicans around the state.
Records from the secretary of state's office show Cobb has added just over 3,600 registered voters -- of all persuasions -- to its rolls since the November general election.
Because Greater Georgia has yet to establish an independent expenditure committee (one formed to spend on a candidate's behalf, without coordinating with said candidate), it won't be expressly endorsing Seabaugh in the race. It's instead calling to "help elect a conservative," though Loeffler was obliquely complimentary of Seabaugh.
"I can tell you that when we have folks that have private sector experience, that have built businesses, that have hired people ... we need more citizen-legislators representing Georgians. We don't need more politicians and activists," she said.
Seabaugh told the MDJ he hasn't been in touch with Greater Georgia, who has instead routed its efforts through the Cobb GOP by training volunteers and organizing canvassing. "They have been out ... trying to rally the Republicans to get out and vote," Seabaugh said, adding he's "cautiously optimistic" about his prospects with less than a week to go.
In lieu of an endorsement, Greater Georgia has tried to frame the race as a referendum on the issues which have burned up the Georgia political scene since March: Senate Bill 202, "election integrity" (or "voter suppression"), and as a corollary, Cobb's loss of the MLB All-Star Game.
"Election integrity is the No. 1 issue that we see right now," Loeffler said, which tracked with the theme of the Cobb GOP's Fourth of July celebration last weekend. A straw poll found "election fraud" top of mind for attendees, a sentiment unlikely to change no matter the outcome of next week's vote.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BGysHwqXCmIkUa2GSTW7wxyQwBLW-FTZIx9PSyRTm3aVmEbvli8rBzJJxoJhq-_w0fkLG_ecxxnqR1Xv5IgrYWxb3ooWtMhQVJu5tH5txW_Z4sdSmB_ZmuEKoXk5cLUB2akgoHWvnqk-gUuGhqoX-BCN7vPZNqHBFwmzJOsxBxwSrIL_-c6DVLoMmSzmx0_QNsA-pTJTjAsX4EsjI_GG579hUPjGCMISgAGFr_4L_KtQ5Kun7NyV8SzdkS3PI8KbC0-LEPaC7EU7ei8APdz_uJWNdqky8PfL2KfXPiMdN5gy0TbTezvtnq7NhtB8Dkgc&c=NsJA7lIaUtjHYm03LXVKWAS2HaSZv8fDQUVamhafaFKM-WcrBuWaLQ==&ch=8kthpXbSlx8aLMgbKPBKRUfkTG6QRHDqTRvUw27YldmO2zqu9eNytw==) to read the full article.

name: Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
subject: What a racist thing to say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez

Peter,

My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, and I'm a proud Hispanic
woman running for Congress in Texas' 15th congressional district.
I'm a small business owner, a mother, a minority, and a proud
Republican. Last year, I came within 6,000 votes of being elected
the first Hispanic Republican elected to the U.S. House from
South Texas.

I believe in the value of hard work. I believe in funding our
border patrol and our police. I believe that the United States of
America while imperfect, is still the envy of the world.

So, when I read a tweet by Democrat congresswoman Cori Bush from
Missouri on the 4th of July, I wondered aloud how anyone could
possibly believe what this woman had to say. See her tweet below.

I say this to Rep. Bush. I live on the border. I was raised on
the border. In my lifetime, I've seen hundreds of thousands -
maybe even millions of immigrants - attempt to gain entry to the
United States. Why? Because the United States is still the best
hope for the world's destitute and those who want to live in a
nation that is consistently striving to be a better version of
its collective self.
If you agree with me that we need more Republicans of minority
descent in the House to help paint a narrative that celebrates
America, rather than tear it down like Miss Bush's, would you
consider a gift to my campaign today of $50, $25 or even just $5?

Donate Today

Stop the anti-American far Left ⇒

As a child of a single mother, I'm here to tell you that the
American dream is alive and well, Peter. I can't speak to the
motives behind this woman's tweet but I can tell you this: words
have consequences, and our adversaries are constantly on the
lookout for ammunition to use against us, to weaken our
democracy.

If I'm fortunate enough to be elected to Congress, you can bet
your bottom dollar that I won't let words like Rep. Bush's go
unchecked. I'd march right down to the House floor and call her
out for this crass lie that she's pushing that America isn't
free.

If Rep. Bush wants to make a visit to the border so she can see
just how many people are eager to get into the country, and to
learn why - then here is her invitation. I'm happy to translate
for her. I think the response may surprise her.

I'll leave off here, and I sincerely hope Rep. Bush sees this.
Thank you, dear Lord, for allowing me to live in this great
country we call the USA, where no matter your background, race,
or religion, you can do or be anything you dream. It may not be
easy and sometimes, and it won't be fair, but in this great
nation and with God - anything is possible.

We need members of Congress who still believe in and embody the
American Dream. If you agree with that statement, I hope you'll
consider a gift to my campaign right now.

Donate Today

Stop the anti-American far Left ⇒

Thank you for your time

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez

Republican for Congress

Paid for by Monica for Congress

name: Jasmine Beach-Ferrara
subject: I’m not what people expect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32129600/294801608/1565190511?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210709_FR_Unexpected_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODJkNWU1Ni1jZGUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hIJJ2LL-YE0uwDqi3z60YyQiQjSJpAHb7aRW0RgHFkg=) Peter, When I tell people I’m a gay Christian minister running for Congress as a Democrat, I’m often met with a little skepticism -- it’s not what people expect. So I wanted to take a few minutes to share how my faith has shaped my life and my approach to politics. My faith teaches me to find the stranger in the room and welcome them. It teaches me to meet people with empathy, to stand with those on the margins, and to love my neighbor -- and my opponent -- no matter who they are. **There are Republicans in Congress, like my opponent, who talk about faith a lot, yet have embraced hatred as part of their platform.** They vilify refugees seeking safety at our borders. They look the other way when members of their own party are accused of harming women. They distort the truth. And when they say “family values,” they don’t mean all families. When I see our current representative promoting ideologies and policies that hurt members of our community, I know that’s just not who we are in Western North Carolina. Who we actually are is what I experience every day and what makes me fundamentally hopeful -- people who lead their lives with kindness and dignity, who know how to love across the lines that often divide us, who don’t stop talking to each other when we disagree. In today’s politics, there’s a tendency to rush to reductive judgments _. That district is red or blue and it’ll never change, those voters believe X or Y and there’s no point having a conversation._ Part of what I love about Western North Carolina is the way we upend expectations and how there’s always more going on than it may at first seem. That’s why I’m running for Congress -- to work alongside people all across Western North Carolina to build the kind of campaign and politics that reflects who we truly are and what we are truly capable of. That’s how we move forward together. That’s what this campaign is all about. **I’m running for you, Peter.[If you’re with me, I’m hoping you’ll chip in $5 or $25 so we can get our message out to every corner of this district.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32129601/294801609/1565190511?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210709_FR_Unexpected_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODJkNWU1Ni1jZGUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hIJJ2LL-YE0uwDqi3z60YyQiQjSJpAHb7aRW0RgHFkg=)** | | | [Chip in $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32129602/294801610/1565190511?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210709_FR_Unexpected_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODJkNWU1Ni1jZGUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hIJJ2LL-YE0uwDqi3z60YyQiQjSJpAHb7aRW0RgHFkg=)

Creating a Political Campaign Communications Plan
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiOTRtMmV0enQzZzZ1ZnQyczZtYWYiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vanFGY0t3RHptMC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzA5MjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9 )

If you’ve ever sold a house, you know the exterior leaves
a defining first impression. A campaign’s communication plan is
no different!

And a good communications plan invites people in to learn
more about your campaign platform and support you. You can learn

The National Democratic Training Committee trains Democrats to not only win campaigns, but also build long-term power in communities nationwide. No matter the year or election cycle, Democrats always have work to do. NDTC does invaluable work supporting the candidates, campaign staffers, and local leaders that are driving change and moving our communities forward. — Terry McAuliffe ( ) 🚨 How to Persuade Voters in a Red District ( ) TODAY, July 9, 1pm ET You’re probably already a pro at talking to most voters. But what about voters in red districts? Join us for TODAY’s expert-led training to learn best practices for talking with voters in red districts so you can make sure you put your best foot forward with every audience. name: Team Malcolm
subject: the reality of this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Something we see every year is a dip in fundraising around July and August
#

Hey there, friend! I'm Catherine, Malcolm's Finance Director.
It's my job to make sure our campaign is raising the money we need to stand out in our crowded field of candidates, and I wanted to reach out and explain something important about the next two months.
See, I've been working in grassroots campaigns for a while, and something we see every year is a dip in fundraising around July and August.
It makes sense. It's summer — people are focused on enjoying their vacations and trying to stay cool. They're probably not thinking about politics, especially in an off-year.
But, honestly, friend, we really can't afford to lose any momentum right now.
That's because our race is heating up every day. Another Republican candidate announced her campaign this week, and she's an even bigger Donald Trump ally than Pat Toomey.
The reality is that it's going to take a ton of resources to stay competitive in this race, so I'm asking for your support today to keep up our grassroots momentum over these next two months.
[So, could you pitch in your first contribution to our campaign to elect Malcolm today? Your gift will ensure we have what it takes to run this race for the long-haul.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32130937/294809234/-353695395?refcode2=1ca92607-d0e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210709-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2E5MjYwNy1kMGUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9T0q9RhKdbk-ZZ5IpDm2hRB8v_fc9fz4OF8OPH06Et0=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32130938/294809235/-353695395?refcode2=1ca92607-d0e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210709-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2E5MjYwNy1kMGUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9T0q9RhKdbk-ZZ5IpDm2hRB8v_fc9fz4OF8OPH06Et0=)**
There's so much at stake for working people like you and me in this race. Our best shot at holding our Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate is right here in Pennsylvania.
Republicans will spend millions to hold on to this seat. But with your support, we can flip this seat blue and send Malcolm to Washington to fight for working families.
Thanks for everything you do,
Catherine
Catherine McParland
Finance Director
Malcolm Kenyatta for U.S. Senate

clean_body: Something we see every year is a dip in fundraising around July and August Hey there, friend! I'm Catherine, Malcolm's Finance Director. It's my job to make sure our campaign is raising the money we need to stand out in our crowded field of candidates, and I wanted to reach out and explain something important about the next two months. See, I've been working in grassroots campaigns for a while, and something we see every year is a dip in fundraising around July and August. It makes sense. It's summer — people are focused on enjoying their vacations and trying to stay cool. They're probably not thinking about politics, especially in an off-year. But, honestly, friend, we really can't afford to lose any momentum right now. That's because our race is heating up every day. Another Republican candidate announced her campaign this week, and she's an even bigger Donald Trump ally than Pat Toomey. The reality is that it's going to take a ton of resources to stay competitive in this race, so I'm asking for your support today to keep up our grassroots momentum over these next two months. = = There's so much at stake for working people like you and me in this race. Our best shot at holding our Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate is right here in Pennsylvania. Republicans will spend millions to hold on to this seat. But with your support, we can flip this seat blue and send Malcolm to Washington to fight for working families. Thanks for everything you do, Catherine Catherine McParland Finance Director Malcolm Kenyatta for U.S. Senate * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: The “Pothead” Second Lady
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m a medicinal marijuana patient, and I want to share my personal story.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210709-1946-header&t=1&akid=1946%2E434096%2EirTcHa)
Hey, Peter — it’s Gisele Barreto Fetterman!
[**_Before I humbly ask you to pitch in your first $5 donation to our campaign_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22007?refcode=em20210709-1946&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1946%2E434096%2EirTcHa), I want to share a personal story:
**My experience as a medicinal marijuana patient.**
John and I are deeply dedicated to the fight for full weed legalization. Legal weed has changed my life, and I know it can help so many others too. My own story of being helped by the plant is my truth, and I’d like to see more people understand it rather than fear it.
I’ve lived with chronic back pain most of my life. Every photo I have leading up to my medical marijuana license has one thing in common, a memory of pain.
I was always fearful of strong prescription medications like opioids. As I got older, I tried countless different combinations to manage my pain: Chiropractic care, yoga, a million types of stretches. They each helped, but there was no long-term fix.
Then, in 2016, Pennsylvania legalized marijuana for medical use. I was one of the first people in line when the first dispensary opened. Today, legal weed is the medicine that keeps me pain-free.
**The prejudice and misinformation surrounding this plant is one of the biggest hurdles to legalization, Peter.** I’m regularly referred to as the “Pothead” Second Lady.” I’ve even had folks tell me, “You don’t look like a medical marijuana user.”
After I was included in an issue of Weed World, people even sent me D.A.R.E. resources. At least it helped my childhood friends dig up this photo of me in 5th grade. Not trying to brag but... art contest winner! 😆
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22007?refcode=em20210709-1946&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1946%2E434096%2EirTcHa)
John and I have been pushing hard for the full legalization of Cannabis in Pennsylvania. In 2019, John embarked on an adult-use cannabis listening tour in all 67 PA counties. In three months, the historic tour saw over 10,000 people turn out in person.
**Weed should be legal, safe, and pure for medicinal and recreational use by adults in Pennsylvania and everywhere in the U.S.** Legal weed will create tens of thousands new jobs. It will help farmers, veterans, and people suffering from chronic pain. It will help us expunge all the senseless marijuana convictions. And it will be a big step forward toward racial justice.
[**_Peter, will you please make your very first donation of $5 to help John keep fighting for legal weed? My husband, John Fetterman, will be the strongest and loudest supporter of legal weed that the Senate has ever seen. Any amount you’re able to give, even $4.20, makes a huge impact._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22007?refcode=em20210709-1946&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=1946%2E434096%2EirTcHa)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22007?refcode=em20210709-1946&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1946%2E434096%2EirTcHa)**
Thank you for reading today, and thank you for your support.
With love,
Gisele ❤️
Gisele Barreto Fetterman
SLOP
Second Lady of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210709-1946-footer&t=24&refcode2=1946_434096_irTcHa&akid=1946%2E434096%2EirTcHa)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=1946%2E434096%2EirTcHa)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1946%2E434096%2EirTcHa)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: God Bless Officer Greg Ferency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Typically we use this space to share the good news from the week about your Indiana Republican Party. This week, unfortunately, we have some sad.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470678?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| _**God Bless Officer Greg Ferency**_ Typically we use this space to share the good news from the week about your Indiana Republican Party. This week, unfortunately, we have some sad news to share. Detective Greg Ferency, a 30-year veteran of the Terre Haute Police Department, was killed in the line of duty on Wednesday. Many of us knew Detective Ferency and his family and his death is a shock to all of us. This violent targeting of law enforcement officers is awful, and that fact that it is becoming a national trend is beyond disturbing. All of us must step up and do what we can to protect the men and women of law enforcement who put their lives on the line each and every day to protect and defend us.

I know I join Hoosier Republicans throughout Indiana in offering our deepest sympathies to Officer Ferency’s family, friends, and fellow officers. We will continue to keep his family in our prayers.
Sincerely,

Kyle
---
|
---
| **_Gov. Holcomb Statement on Police Detective Greg Ferency_** Governor Holcomb offered the following statement regarding the death of Terre Haute Police Detective Greg Ferency.
_**"The tragic events that unfolded today are senseless. Our heart breaks for Detective Greg Ferency's family, loved ones and those who served with him every day protecting the residents of the Wabash Valley. Janet and I are thinking of the Terre Haute Police Department, the community and Detective Ferency's family as I know they will be steadfast in honoring his life, service and dedication to the residents of Vigo County.”**_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_Expanding Indiana's Global Ties_** **Governor Holcomb** visited Qatar this week to promote Indiana's economic innovation. By meeting with American and Middle Eastern leaders abroad, **Governor Holcomb** is helping to improve Indiana's global connections through innovation and job creation.

_**Photo:**_ _Governor Holcomb with CdA Ambassador John Desrocher._
---
|
---
| _**2021 Inaugural Diversity Series Graduation Luncheon**_
You are invited to join us for our 2021 Inaugural Diversity Series Graduation Luncheon! For more information and to RSVP please visit our website: [http://indiana.gop/events/2021-inaugural-diversity-series-graduation-luncheon](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=47e481bbc1&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Growing the Indiana Republican Party**_ Republican National Committee spokesman Paris Dennard had some great things to say about our ongoing efforts to attract more Hoosiers to the Indiana Republican Party. In the clip below, he shares some thoughts about what we’re doing in Indiana and the larger movement we’re seeing of members of minority communities joining the Republican Party in record numbers. Watch the clip here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GlFkhKjAK3M](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3d026a8454&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=937437230d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|

| _**Lugar Series Applications**_ Applications for the 32nd Class of the Richard G. Lugar Excellence in Public Service Series are now available! The Lugar Series is a political leadership development program dedicated to increasing the number of Republican women in local, state and federal elective and appointive office. The application period opened on June 1 and closes on August 1, 2021. Information about the application can be found at [lugarseries.com/apply/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6e859c6487&e=1acd9bb3d6) or by contacting [lugarseries@gmail.com](mailto:lugarseries@gmail.com).

| _**Chairman Hupfer Op-Ed**_ Chairman Hupfer wrote an op-ed this week about Democrat attempts to gaslight the American people when it comes to their support of the “defund the police” movement.
**_“_**** _Republicans will always back the blue – and we hope our Democrat friends across the country can renounce the radical leaders of their party and join us in supporting the police_**** _“ -Chairman Hupfer_**
You can read his piece here: [http://indiana.gop/news/gop-chairman-hupfer-don%E2%80%99t-fall-democrat-gaslighting-police](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=06354cfd55&e=1acd9bb3d6)

| _**Indiana Legislators Blast Biden for Eliminating Work Requirements**_ Our entire Republican Congressional delegation in Washington signed a letter expressing their disapproval of the Biden administration’s decision to revoke the Gateway to Work program, which would require certain able-bodied adult Healthy Indiana Plan members to report 20 hours of work, job training, volunteering, or school activities each month. You can read more about their efforts here: [http://www.wbiw.com/2021/07/02/indiana-legislators-blast-bidens-administration-for-revoking-indianas-gateway-to-work-program/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=773978e11d&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: Typically we use this space to share the good news from the week about your Indiana Republican Party. This week, unfortunately, we have some sad.. | | | | | | | God Bless Officer Greg Ferency Typically we use this space to share the good news from the week about your Indiana Republican Party. This week, unfortunately, we have some sad news to share. Detective Greg Ferency, a 30-year veteran of the Terre Haute Police Department, was killed in the line of duty on Wednesday. Many of us knew Detective Ferency and his family and his death is a shock to all of us. This violent targeting of law enforcement officers is awful, and that fact that it is becoming a national trend is beyond disturbing. All of us must step up and do what we can to protect the men and women of law enforcement who put their lives on the line each and every day to protect and defend us. I know I join Hoosier Republicans throughout Indiana in offering our deepest sympathies to Officer Ferency’s family, friends, and fellow officers. We will continue to keep his family in our prayers. Sincerely, Kyle | | Gov. Holcomb Statement on Police Detective Greg Ferency Governor Holcomb offered the following statement regarding the death of Terre Haute Police Detective Greg Ferency. "The tragic events that unfolded today are senseless. Our heart breaks for Detective Greg Ferency's family, loved ones and those who served with him every day protecting the residents of the Wabash Valley. Janet and I are thinking of the Terre Haute Police Department, the community and Detective Ferency's family as I know they will be steadfast in honoring his life, service and dedication to the residents of Vigo County.” | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Expanding Indiana's Global Ties Governor Holcomb visited Qatar this week to promote Indiana's economic innovation. By meeting with American and Middle Eastern leaders abroad, Governor Holcomb is helping to improve Indiana's global connections through innovation and job creation. name: Lisa Scheller for Congress
subject: Veterans for Scheller Coalition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress Inc
body:
Today, Republican Congressional Candidate Lisa Scheller announces Veterans for Scheller Coalition. Contact: Pierce Frauenheim Pierce@schellerforcongress.com For immediate release: **Lisa Scheller for Congress Announces Veterans for Scheller Coalition** **Allentown, Pa.** – Today, the Scheller Campaign is proud to announce the Veterans for Scheller Coalition. "I stand strongly with, and am eternally grateful for, the brave men and women who have and currently serve our great country," said candidate Scheller. "I am honored to name Shawn Welch as my Veterans for Scheller Coalition Coordinator. Shawn has served in the Army for 31 years and achieved the rank of Colonel. I thank Shawn for his service and for his willingness to join our campaign!" Shawn Welch released the following statement:

"As an experienced international business leader, Lisa has acquired a robust and in-depth understanding of and strongly supports issues that matter to veterans and those in service to our nation. She has sought the counsel of these men and women for their unique insights regarding the important issues of our times. Lisa has a deep concern regarding the care of veterans and will work for effective solutions to the problems that plague veterans benefits administration. Lisa’s commitment to the veterans of the Lehigh Valley will be demonstrated by her donation of her congressional salary to Lehigh Valley veterans organizations and her advocacy for supporting legislation on their behalf. I strongly endorse and support Lisa Scheller for Congress.” ### [Sign up to join Veterans for Scheller!](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=a3fa7cbf70f74c3ca1d3a0c3f9ac3848&_e=zBLwXlThymOijkJVyS_DPw9VJMDStlql-khyAU9bll4cnBmoMmHOIa7sAyK5OPAX-sbUP3w1o2jqWYMNtVqLiRqpQwcSRXW86PGYAQhfOuQXKravLcH2kbOj6J5PiU0_QNXnRizI9o5hGyEqJz0rYtBbF8vhda0zfP_rleytWZfg2gKagrn-H1Mw_lIyia04FcK3WFn_-Ho09TJ8QBVpM7Nrmcu6KnusrSWAPrgIdc-YqGJl99QP-2Q5aoJ0K7iBUhPZPDF7R_zxEhMC5qQKANpPY6KDr-4z2jPfvGRpYHs%3D) | | [](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=a3fa7cbf70f74c3ca1d3a0c3f9ac3848&_e=zBLwXlThymOijkJVyS_DP76JvAucfE92MkFSfZ_hKYNbdp32JnSgE6XPWNIICSKgZr62RyNikvlZb4WssEz-jN9i210zCnS0Nkwld3unN9jG9XNDgjwVyRiKexh72DrRKDeY8liqkyftt99e_v__Cb2qpo_rM0Jqt6cjWmy4k_0Vztcwta_xW3p4Nj3Z4vRaHxEXyKxAOiAbF8wLDctttM9p8-wjdhXk3hVshczJl3OAngKuC2mckUqI9Czrtgr-a84aOgCzpxXqc-Qn02j3cs4-W4f1JBbXU2zbLrCDCjo%3D) | [](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=a3fa7cbf70f74c3ca1d3a0c3f9ac3848&_e=zBLwXlThymOijkJVyS_DP9NbKcN4UJwilau-xpcbVVbCAoCB1ak2NzPphbbW2iSrHv4uZsFObuaeepMNG-iUl3Dymg3vUa_groD9kb8dxGbg36WFG3qi5wL-GNaYv1lVYCAKP2X5AT0elakrUPRqbX9IMSP8Qoh0MZsplAvBrmBNulfPj5HM4QFMfs8CcjvTY-X03ROOYyVuBGNqy-k2c0q76i4-AdEp8IM5XDLkXHrWrD-LzcmA4wfCHIvw3WlAst3rrTOxkjK0J7E6M-y-gg%3D%3D)

subject: I’m Hispanic but not a Democrat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE CASTILLO FOR CONGRESS
body:
News alert: Hispanics are no longer all Democrats. I know what it’s like to live in a corrupt country, I won’t let America become a socialist nation. News alert: Hispanics are no longer all Democrats. We left behind socialist countries and we won’t let America become a socialist nation. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=38966683e8744ae08c4e992d0c58af87&_e=r3jzgTsfyFAYYqlLkYGs74r6yMxY4cmIsffu5tq586vkVhOGMQ_6sUYW8VlnG4HHu5q8tRAgiAXxsZlKVDCOv809AMG4g5xr3KMsDM38U0a57M_nLVpI77p6OTe4xrsbOF0R_UfbgUPC2R5HJocrGwmACR-IRpGxSO2lDV8AoDLk2c49mz0za-mw4l4yecgtwWzvsnOWMjgBJy8to3dPAvT5jan9omldvLkxVAo3gJ4KPPODYdCpXwTKKT6jsbT8olkD5yUdirBFAd7BRUqblb-5gVepJUk6BPFhiNN-t4naeahif2PuX-Iux-ISpsgM9Q7C6llXdVpsDHLifjA0Fwt2PmUb5cTZSTgNvBcQrVIY9uBw3IMHrpW-ljj6UZ4KNvTGBVhBfJD3e0j35_CLEoxt0IVoeaGqmdRtY_fnKK5jwx44oPdXhsVWmRerp--E_7RpZST5NLhDxhVAq3_qEO7Y1X4q8NClJcWjMmUe2Ko%3D)

---
Peter - - Democrats think that to be Hispanic, you must vote Blue.

We should welcome them to the 21st century because, I don’t know if you’ve heard - _but Hispanics are no longer all Democrats._

That’s right, thanks to former President Donald Trump’s common-sense policies and the liberal’s insane socialist logic, the tides are turning. **_The Democrat’s socialist agenda does not align with Hispanic’s conservative values any longer._**

Frankly, it’s racist that Democrats think that skin color has anything to do with political ideology.

You may not know me, so I want to take a minute to introduce myself. My name is Jose Castillo. I was born in New Orleans but grew up in Honduras with a strong, single mother before returning to the United States. I now live in Florida with my beautiful wife and daughter, living the American dream.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=38966683e8744ae08c4e992d0c58af87&_e=r3jzgTsfyFAYYqlLkYGs74r6yMxY4cmIsffu5tq586vkVhOGMQ_6sUYW8VlnG4HHu5q8tRAgiAXxsZlKVDCOv809AMG4g5xr3KMsDM38U0a57M_nLVpI77p6OTe4xrsbOF0R_UfbgUPC2R5HJocrGwmACR-IRpGxSO2lDV8AoDLk2c49mz0za-mw4l4yecgtwWzvsnOWMjgBJy8to3dPAvT5jan9omldvLkxVAo3gJ4KPPODYdCpXwTKKT6jsbT8olkD5yUdirBFAd7BRUqblX_fBfFyNPncgfb4u0XArjl3w7C9KkKmJzHDTkv-A_6SDA9CbM63e6PlXiq2IjOJE69YET0kAegMouw_38z9xh4uHeH-BnU91N9kTC9YbIwfLUsOrh8WHUj_5dbHex5MINraRmddiYTTuzJNSOFJ5l3hxUSzFU30DhlmwD8XJdJ9oZtgvCZZENmsIhkg1_brMondqWyF3gTzSA0af3f3XHA%3D)
_This is me during Donald Trump’s ‘Save America’ Rally in Florida in July_
After witnessing the Democrats destroy Donald Trump’s America-First agenda, I decided to run for Congress in Florida’s 9th district. I’m a pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment, and pro-America First conservative. I know what it's like to live in a corrupt country. There's a reason I left it behind - and I don't want those socialist policies to be implemented into America. [**It would be an honor if you would chip in $10 to help elect a Hispanic conservative from Florida to take on the Democrats and make Congress great again.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=38966683e8744ae08c4e992d0c58af87&_e=r3jzgTsfyFAYYqlLkYGs74r6yMxY4cmIsffu5tq586vkVhOGMQ_6sUYW8VlnG4HHu5q8tRAgiAXxsZlKVDCOv809AMG4g5xr3KMsDM38U0a57M_nLVpI77p6OTe4xrsbOF0R_UfbgUPC2R5HJocrGwmACR-IRpGxSO2lDV8AoDLk2c49mz0za-mw4l4yecgtwWzvsnOWMjgBJy8to3dPAvT5jan9omldvLkxVAo3gJ4KPPODYdCpXwTKKT6jsbT8olkD5yUdirBFAd7BRUqblbY9lLYYfqh19ovY0MHw3WudN0qoJ2Iv0VpIgM6p-4FGKCrHLKwqubVv2HR2XyxSAD-Sbq635bKFJEvc6RfHDX8ltEFl4HGIrMiiL1FUEvYRRm7Q0O-uvOwk1tlM3XCdci0d7IADpRnLRM725KkIo1Mnlt7iUT_0WUZ36VEtnyOX8j2hDc4o3HQYEwtlWcmkX6F63ui-LEpSrG1jH8k4Hjc%3D)

[ Make Congress Great Again

clean_body: News alert: Hispanics are no longer all Democrats. I know what it’s like to live in a corrupt country, I won’t let America become a socialist nation. News alert: Hispanics are no longer all Democrats. We left behind socialist countries and we won’t let America become a socialist nation. | Peter - - Democrats think that to be Hispanic, you must vote Blue. We should welcome them to the 21st century because, I don’t know if you’ve heard - but Hispanics are no longer all Democrats. That’s right, thanks to former President Donald Trump’s common-sense policies and the liberal’s insane socialist logic, the tides are turning. The Democrat’s socialist agenda does not align with Hispanic’s conservative values any longer. Frankly, it’s racist that Democrats think that skin color has anything to do with political ideology. You may not know me, so I want to take a minute to introduce myself. My name is Jose Castillo. I was born in New Orleans but grew up in Honduras with a strong, single mother before returning to the United States. I now live in Florida with my beautiful wife and daughter, living the American dream. This is me during Donald Trump’s ‘Save America’ Rally in Florida in July After witnessing the Democrats destroy Donald Trump’s America-First agenda, I decided to run for Congress in Florida’s 9th district. I’m a pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment, and pro-America First conservative. I know what it's like to live in a corrupt country. There's a reason I left it behind - and I don't want those socialist policies to be implemented into America. Hispanics are walking away from the racist, do-nothing Democrats once and for all. Their ‘values’ do not equate to the same things we want. We want secure borders, an open economy, common-sense policies, and we strongly oppose allowing the U.S. to become a socialist nation. We want liberal logic out of our lives. Here’s the deal - Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you we have a real opportunity to unseat a Democrat and flip a blue seat RED! Thank you for your time, I look forward to fighting for our shared conservative values and making Congress GREAT (Republican) again! God Bless, Jose Castillo Republican for Congress | | PAID FOR BY JOSE CASTILLO FOR CONGRESS Jose Castillo for Congress PO Box 2651 Davenport, FL 33836 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Erica Smith
subject: I’m a dirt road Democrat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I’m proud to be the only candidate in this primary with a Green New Deal, reparations, and Medicare for All front and center in my platform.
#
Hi, it’s Erica.
**I’m a dirt road Democrat running to become North Carolina’s next U.S. Senator.** If you didn’t know that already, now you do.
Unlike other candidates in this primary who have jobs that allow them to call wealthy donors all day, I have to spend my time doing what I’ve been doing since I was 9 years old.
That’s harvesting corn and picking cucumbers on the family farm! The same family farm where I was raised, and my mother before me.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/4767?refcode=em20210709-245&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=245%2E3698%2E7nN3QH)
I understand the dignity of work. I know what it means to struggle, to work all day to put food on the table for your family. These are the values and experiences behind our campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina.
Look, I’m proud to be the only candidate in this primary with a Green New Deal, reparations, and Medicare for All front and center in my platform.
**My opponents, on the other hand, are afraid of being bold.** They’re beholden to the Democratic establishment’s moderate playbook, and unfortunately they outraised us by a lot last quarter.
But let’s just be honest with ourselves: We live in a world where our oceans are literally burning, where Black men are imprisoned at six times the rate of white men, and where working families go bankrupt because of health care costs. **Urgent, progressive change — the kind of change I am uniquely fighting for in this primary for U.S. Senate — cannot wait.**
It looks like you haven’t donated to our campaign yet, which is why I am reaching out to you today:
[**_Will you make a donation of $5 or more to our unapologetic, scrappy campaign today, please? We can’t afford to be outraised by our moderate establishment opponents this quarter, which is why small-dollar, online donations, like yours, are so important._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/4767?refcode=em20210709-245&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=245%2E3698%2E7nN3QH)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/4767?refcode=em20210709-245&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=245%2E3698%2E7nN3QH)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate
P.S. Our campaign doesn’t take a dime of corporate or fossil fuel money trying to buy D.C. influence. [**_We rely on grassroots donors like you, chipping in $1, $3, $5 at a time to support our people-powered movement through emails like this one. Will you please make a donation of $5 or more today?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/4767?refcode=em20210709-245&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=245%2E3698%2E7nN3QH)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210709-245-footer&t=23&refcode2=245_3698_7nN3QH&akid=245%2E3698%2E7nN3QH)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=245%2E3698%2E7nN3QH)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=245%2E3698%2E7nN3QH)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Rand Paul
subject: Critical race theory spits in the face of civil rights!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57904020:6t7Z1JlNm:m:1:3253819041:2963DCBE66653D41A0B82348D3E8C3D9:r) | |
---
Peter,

Critical race theory is divisive down to its very core.

It's a movement that seeks to indoctrinate our children, rewrite history, and spit in the face of civil rights.

There's no place for it in our classrooms, our military, or our government - and I'm not going to stop saying that anytime soon.
[**I AGREE: STAND WITH RAND >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57904020:6t7Z1JlNm:m:1:3253819041:2963DCBE66653D41A0B82348D3E8C3D9:r)
The Biden-Harris administration has embraced this out-of-touch philosophy because they've been completely overrun by the radicals within their party.

You thought the Green New Deal was bad? Or maybe that 1 year+ of lockdowns would be the worst of it?

The truth is - that was only the beginning.

_The radical left wants to divide every American, replace every institution, and rebuild our nation to resemble the "socialist utopia" hellscape they've always wanted._

Putting an end to Critical Race Theory is just one step in stopping their destructive plans.

As a Senator, I have the chance to stand up to the bureaucrats implementing critical race theory, but I need your help to show our strength against this radicalism. Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?

You can use this secure link: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2563203/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57904020:6t7Z1JlNm:m:1:3253819041:2963DCBE66653D41A0B82348D3E8C3D9:r)**

Together, I know you and I can stop them. And we can't give up until we do.
In Liberty,
Rand Paul
