name: Team Harder
subject: amazing update
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| | Peter, We have an _amazing_ update to this email! After months and months of Josh fighting to increase federal firefighter pay - **President Biden heard Josh 's calls, and now it's officially happening!** As you may remember - one of the big issues we have fighting wildfires in California is a shortage of firefighters because their pay is so low. In fact, before Josh took up this fight, they were making less than the California minimum wage. President Biden heard from Josh and agreed it was unacceptable - and last week announced he was officially increasing federal firefighter pay this year! It's a huge win not just for firefighters, but also for making sure our families stay safe. We know this year is going to be one of the worst wildfire seasons, and we have to be prepared. We also know that this is just the start - next we need to make the pay raise permanent _and_ continue our longer term investments to fight climate change. We can't let evacuations, orange skies, and smokey air be our new normal. Thanks for all your support - we're so proud of Josh for getting this done!
Team Harder | [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/r6K4XwrtJPg2tDA2m05tN3PGOv7m4gJnFj7J-i6I5jA=/fqG9iQQZ7A4Z5PBjt_qyUsKQvvIulovXZ9xtRJxzYE8=?refcode=E10110-20210709-Firefighters-SB-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)
---

_\----FORWARDED MESSAGE----_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/r6K4XwrtJPg2tDA2m05tN3PGOv7m4gJnFj7J-i6I5jA=/fqG9iQQZ7A4Z5PBjt_qyUsKQvvIulovXZ9xtRJxzYE8=?refcode=E10110-20210709-Firefighters-header-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)
Hey Peter --
Wildfire season is officially here, and right now most of California is classified in "extreme" drought. It's a huge emergency for our state, so a few months ago I started digging into what I could do to make sure we were ready to fight back.
What I discovered was shocking.
Not only are we not ready for the long term environmental consequences of wildfires, **we don 't even have the firefighters we need for this year!**
Let me explain. You may have heard of "hotshot" crews, they are the most elite firefighting crews we've got. _Turns out they are currently understaffed by 30% -- and it's because the federal government barely pays them enough to survive._
I learned that state firefighters in California are paid on average $70,000 a year, but federal firefighters, like these hotshot crews, are only getting $38,000 a year (which is a measly $13.45 an hour). That's less than our minimum wage in California! Firefighting is some of the most dangerous and important work we've got and nobody should be making less than $14 an hour doing it. It's not hard to imagine how underpaying our firefighters is leading to overworked and understaffed fire departments.
Last year was the worst fire year we've ever seen -- 4 million acres burned, 10,000 buildings destroyed, dozens of lives lost -- we can't afford that kind of damage right now. **And yet, even though experts say this year is going to be even worse than last year, the number of federal firefighters we have has actually dropped.**
**We 're asking these firefighters to put their lives on the line doing very dangerous and often life-saving work. They should at the very least make a livable wage!**
I want you to know that I'm fighting every day to make sure our communities are as safe as possible. We know this fire season is going to be devastating and we can't be underprepared.
That's why I'm leading the fight in Congress to pay our firefighters a living wage -- because I refuse to let our crews go into the blaze understaffed. We need to be ready.
I'm going to keep digging into this issue, and will make sure to keep you updated on our progress.
Josh
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/r6K4XwrtJPg2tDA2m05tN3PGOv7m4gJnFj7J-i6I5jA=/fqG9iQQZ7A4Z5PBjt_qyUsKQvvIulovXZ9xtRJxzYE8=?refcode=E10110-20210709-Firefighters-SB-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/r6K4XwrtJPg2tDA2m05tN3PGOv7m4gJnFj7J-i6I5jA=/HBt4iRIfxAEYNuqFhvhcntgakHK1Zz9pTDo8Ac64KIs=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/r6K4XwrtJPg2tDA2m05tN3PGOv7m4gJnFj7J-i6I5jA=/FQMM32CYFaKstn81NOHrPYOLq0Z2IZm6QIXJO6UrGmI=)

You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/r6K4XwrtJPg2tDA2m05tN3PGOv7m4gJnFj7J-i6I5jA=/Kfp7sY1QV3Qn3JPFeB8kyddcivYe0YYBnJERG5Jlv-M=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/r6K4XwrtJPg2tDA2m05tN3PGOv7m4gJnFj7J-i6I5jA=/ZnHwV54WL4cBH5bdu5d1IAmGutV8HkMQaQj1XZ0Tywg=) here.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/r6K4XwrtJPg2tDA2m05tN3PGOv7m4gJnFj7J-i6I5jA=/fqG9iQQZ7A4Z5PBjt_qyUsKQvvIulovXZ9xtRJxzYE8=?refcode=E10110-20210709-Firefighters-footer-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/r6K4XwrtJPg2tDA2m05tN3PGOv7m4gJnFj7J-i6I5jA=/fqG9iQQZ7A4Z5PBjt_qyUsKQvvIulovXZ9xtRJxzYE8=?refcode=E10110-20210709-Firefighters-footer-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. Josh was re-elected to Congress on behalf of families in the Central Valley where he's fighting to hold our government accountable, pass COVID-19 relief, and deliver on our progressive values. **[Will you help him keep up the fight in Congress by making a contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/r6K4XwrtJPg2tDA2m05tN3PGOv7m4gJnFj7J-i6I5jA=/fqG9iQQZ7A4Z5PBjt_qyUsKQvvIulovXZ9xtRJxzYE8=?refcode=E10110-20210709-Firefighters-footer-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)**

| | Peter, Rand Paul has spent his time in the Senate parroting racist conspiracies, attempting to undermine democracy, and accomplishing nothing. He rallied against impeaching Donald Trump and joined other insurrectionist Republicans by refusing to investigate the Capitol insurrection. And this unwavering support of Trump came after Rand Paul said that Trump was a "fake conservative" and a "delusional narcissist.” **That flip-flopping might be spineless, but it is also calculated.** | **[DEFEAT RAND PAUL \-- SECURE THE SENATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32137561/294833178/-29553365?refcode=OUT_20210709_GEN_FDR_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyNGVjN2FkLWUzZTAtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hu313NW6m1_4hUe3S_bkHGPXeDUMwk29MufrRzHJmsM=)**

Properly placated, Trump will be happy to direct his legion of mega-rich donors and far-right supporters to POUR money into Paul's race against Charles Booker. It's clear that when given the choice between Trump's dark money and American democracy, Rand Paul will choose the money EVERY. SINGLE. TIME.

**That's why we've set an ambitious goal of raising $5,000 for our Secure the Senate fund to beat Paul as he runs for reelection next year, but we need to have the full support of our grassroots army with us in our fight to expand our Senate majority.**

**[Peter, defending and expanding our majority is of the utmost importance in the coming midterm elections, and Rand Paul's opponent, Charles Booker, gives us a fantastic opportunity to take back this critical Senate seat. We know you understand how fragile our Democratic majority is, but too many Democrats are ignoring this race and allowing Rand Paul to walk to victory. name: Darryn Harris, Team Bass
subject: Did you hear what the Supreme Court decided?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Hello --

The Supreme Court of the United States just dealt another major blow to the Voting Rights Act of 1965 (VRA). Last week the court ruled in favor of not one -- but two -- Arizona voter suppression laws, making it harder for Black and brown people to vote.

I wish I could say this was the first attack on voting rights we've seen this year. It isn't. **Fourteen states have passed at least 22 voter suppression laws. And all to support Donald Trump's Big Lie that the election was stolen.**

Politicians don't get to decide our elections. The American people do. That's why Karen signed on as an original co-sponsor of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to expand and strengthen the original VRA and restore key protections against racial discrimination in voting.

**[After this court ruling, it's urgent we take action immediately. Our team needs to gather 1,000 grassroots signatures by midnight TONIGHT, calling on Congress to defend and expand the right to vote. Will you join Karen in this important fight and add your name?](https://act.myngp.com/el/PpfJ3hjTNG-8_RCYyUf4K-RYy-NQkmsDWBCQ_HBwrh0=/YoM2c9_ZpWaMMT-HfEBIEbxMcrmpuW9jVzr2zSXtMZY=?gpsid=39_132_19656&ms=em21_210709_vraa_adv_gq_act__kbfc_ettx&refcode=em21_210709_vraa_adv_gq_act__kbfc_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210709_vraa_adv_gq_act__kbfc_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

The right to vote is the foundation of all our other legal rights in America. Suppressing the Black and brown vote has been a vehicle for white supremacy for centuries as a way to silence our voices.

Karen is refusing to sit by silently while state legislatures roll back the rights our ancestors fought for and even gave their lives for. She is sounding the alarm and demanding leaders in Congress defend the rights of all Americans.

**[Will you take action with Karen to help protect and expand access to the ballot box? Sign our petition to demand Congress protect the right to vote.](https://act.myngp.com/el/PpfJ3hjTNG-8_RCYyUf4K-RYy-NQkmsDWBCQ_HBwrh0=/YoM2c9_ZpWaMMT-HfEBIEbxMcrmpuW9jVzr2zSXtMZY=?gpsid=39_132_19656&ms=em21_210709_vraa_adv_gq_act__kbfc_ettx&refcode=em21_210709_vraa_adv_gq_act__kbfc_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210709_vraa_adv_gq_act__kbfc_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

In solidarity,

Darryn Harris
Karen Bass for Congress

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/PpfJ3hjTNG-8_RCYyUf4K-RYy-NQkmsDWBCQ_HBwrh0=/6osBBimasa5tC6UZJEBvknb984NawbRjdmP4d6prqUM=?gpsid=39_132_19563&refcode=em21_210709_vraa_adv_gq_act__kbfc_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210709_vraa_adv_gq_act__kbfc_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

body:
She Should Be Kicked Out of Congress For This
---
| | | | | | Maxine Waters Hates America!
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z5woP6BFdaxl5aksBvutvVXVebWLfv4l9ri47u2q_9uV3jj91y6Pl_SnJpEHMhn8sGsO_e15uMkKMQmrIUQBy-yT00dJmyxmZ5IcGbKzCXGE3bG8nIVbnrHl9gsAD2QmFsxtM-Slnrb419sJi4qLopa_gy5ph6v3unQREXiv7YjQoGUR6GbuwSrwVwauPaIi&c=PNNBbgopRKItkflBaJlb_VIMf41TIE6vxKrGhWSlEGpYUhyHS8zhmg==&ch=-VWfPtDvTwMAwyzqckBpTp7PzLEJIiNdpncFJf02WwMZSrYS3EyEEw==)
---
| | |
---
| Hello Peter,
---
|
The 4th of July, Independence Day, is the one day in America when Americans really come together to celebrate the greatest country in the world. It's a powerful reminder that we are all united as Americans.
But Maxine Waters just used it to further divide us, and really proved how much she hates the country she is supposed to be representing.
---
| | | [Click HERE to Fire the Most Unpatriotic Congressperson](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z5woP6BFdaxl5aksBvutvVXVebWLfv4l9ri47u2q_9uV3jj91y6Pl_SnJpEHMhn8sGsO_e15uMkKMQmrIUQBy-yT00dJmyxmZ5IcGbKzCXGE3bG8nIVbnrHl9gsAD2QmFsxtM-Slnrb419sJi4qLopa_gy5ph6v3unQREXiv7YjQoGUR6GbuwSrwVwauPaIi&c=PNNBbgopRKItkflBaJlb_VIMf41TIE6vxKrGhWSlEGpYUhyHS8zhmg==&ch=-VWfPtDvTwMAwyzqckBpTp7PzLEJIiNdpncFJf02WwMZSrYS3EyEEw==)
---
| On the day that patriotic Americans were out wearing their Red, White and Blue and setting off fireworks while singing patriotic anthems, Maxine Waters tweeted this:
---
|
---
| I'm black, I get it that there are real problems that must be addressed in this country related to race. But I still love my country and literally fought to defend it.
Let's take her stance on voter suppression as just one example: she and her Liberal cronies want people to be able to just go in and vote with no ID, or to mail in ballots with no constraints or oversight. What are they so afraid of?
ID is required to do almost everything "big" in this country, from getting an apartment or mortgage, to going to the doctor, to opening a bank account. I could go on and on. But have you ever heard the Liberals whine about these things? Nope!
---
|
---
| I pray that you will help me end Hater Maxine Waters' career in Congress. She's been dividing our great country for years and she must go. Please [chip in $30 right now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z5woP6BFdaxl5aksBvutvVXVebWLfv4l9ri47u2q_9uV3jj91y6Pl_SnJpEHMhn8sGsO_e15uMkKMQmrIUQBy-yT00dJmyxmZ5IcGbKzCXGE3bG8nIVbnrHl9gsAD2QmFsxtM-Slnrb419sJi4qLopa_gy5ph6v3unQREXiv7YjQoGUR6GbuwSrwVwauPaIi&c=PNNBbgopRKItkflBaJlb_VIMf41TIE6vxKrGhWSlEGpYUhyHS8zhmg==&ch=-VWfPtDvTwMAwyzqckBpTp7PzLEJIiNdpncFJf02WwMZSrYS3EyEEw==), that's one dollar for every year she has been in Congress, so we can get rid of the most loud mouthed, corrupt and abhorrent member of Congress that ever was.
---
| | | [Click HERE to Help Me Fire Maxine](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z5woP6BFdaxl5aksBvutvVXVebWLfv4l9ri47u2q_9uV3jj91y6Pl_SnJpEHMhn8sGsO_e15uMkKMQmrIUQBy-yT00dJmyxmZ5IcGbKzCXGE3bG8nIVbnrHl9gsAD2QmFsxtM-Slnrb419sJi4qLopa_gy5ph6v3unQREXiv7YjQoGUR6GbuwSrwVwauPaIi&c=PNNBbgopRKItkflBaJlb_VIMf41TIE6vxKrGhWSlEGpYUhyHS8zhmg==&ch=-VWfPtDvTwMAwyzqckBpTp7PzLEJIiNdpncFJf02WwMZSrYS3EyEEw==)

Joe Collins Republican Candidate & Navy Veteran Running Against Maxine Waters For California's 43rd

subject: Priorities Survey

body:
Happy National Parks and Recreation Month, Peter!

Now, most people don't know July is Parks and Rec month, but you know who _does_ know? These two:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32140725/294843638/1714397553?gpsid=50_130_19670&refcode=em21_210709_Knope_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx_sl2&utm_campaign=em21_210709_Knope_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx_sl2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTA4OWY0ZC1lZWUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TBdChCiZpWU62m0c9lEh-VLBE5wg5TNDHcbh6clVId4=)
When Sarah first launched this campaign, some folks on social media were quick to point out the resemblance between _Parks & Rec_ fictional character Leslie Knope and Sarah -- saying she had, and we quote, "massive Leslie Knope energy."

**But the similarities don't end there.**

Leslie and Sarah are both extraordinarily hardworking public servants who are dedicated to their communities and ready to make a meaningful difference. Neither one of them has ever backed down from a tough fight, in fact, they're always ready for a challenge. They're both (spoiler alert!) working moms with can-do attitudes who break down barriers. And they both believe the government should serve the people, including providing public services like parks -- Sarah's parents and sisters drove to every national park during their summer breaks!

**Basically, Sarah and Leslie are both strong women who get sh*t done.** But (sorry -- another spoiler) while they both have a history of winning tough races, it takes a whole crew to win. Leslie had Ann, Ben, Donna, Tom, and even Ron. Sarah needs you.

**[We can't elect Leslie Knope, but we do have the chance to elect her real-life counterpart. We can take down Ron Johnson and expand our Senate majority, but only if we have your support. This Sunday we have a critical fundraising deadline and I need your help.
With the help of the Senate Democrats, Governor Cuomo is advancing a radical agenda that is pushing our state over a cliff.
Instead of helping hardworking families during a pandemic, Governor Cuomo has focused on:

* Raising taxes on struggling businesses and families

Now this Governor is looking to blame law-abiding gun owners for the rising crime across the state.
Enough is Enough!
It is time to fight back! name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: The Supreme Court gutted the Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
In state legislatures across the country, Republicans have introduced a record-breaking number of bills this year to restrict the right to vote. After losing the White House, Senate, and House last election, they're resorting to changing the rules in order to win. And the Supreme Court just ruled in their favor. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32141264/294847367/667319202?gpsid=8_30_19661&source=em21_210709_voting_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210709_voting_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzYwMWM0My1mMGUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KVbEbbWoeOlLUIuG0uxeQBFgh-e7ZHjo95RHv4YUhAg=&emci=d7f074d3-c3e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=67601c43-f0e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)
**The Supreme Court Deals A New Blow To Voting Rights, Upholding Arizona Restrictions** Voting rights are under attack like never before, Peter.

In state legislatures across the country, Republicans have introduced a record-breaking number of bills this year to restrict the right to vote. After losing the White House, Senate, and House last election, they're resorting to changing the rules in order to win. **And the Supreme Court just ruled in their favor.**

Last week, the Supreme Court upheld two restrictive Arizona voting laws, gutting what remained of the crucial Voting Rights Act. It's now easier for lawmakers to restrict access to the ballot box for millions of Americans.

**[We need Congress to take action to protect the right to vote before it's too late. Add your name to join Kim in the fight to pass voting rights protections →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32141265/294847368/667319202?gpsid=8_30_19661&source=em21_210709_voting_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210709_voting_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzYwMWM0My1mMGUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KVbEbbWoeOlLUIuG0uxeQBFgh-e7ZHjo95RHv4YUhAg=&emci=d7f074d3-c3e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=67601c43-f0e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32141266/294847369/667319202?gpsid=8_30_19661&source=em21_210709_voting_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210709_voting_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzYwMWM0My1mMGUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KVbEbbWoeOlLUIuG0uxeQBFgh-e7ZHjo95RHv4YUhAg=&emci=d7f074d3-c3e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=67601c43-f0e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)
---

In Congress, Kim is fighting back against voter suppression to ensure that every American can make their voice heard. She joined her House colleagues in helping pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act and the For the People Act to prevent discrimination, end partisan gerrymandering, provide automatic voter registration, increase ballot box access, and so much more.

But with the new Supreme Court ruling making it easier to attack the right to vote, it's more important than ever that sweeping voter protection legislation gets signed into law -- before it's too late.

**[If you agree, add your name to stand with Kim and join her in the fight to protect the right to vote.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32141267/294847370/667319202?gpsid=8_30_19661&source=em21_210709_voting_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210709_voting_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzYwMWM0My1mMGUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KVbEbbWoeOlLUIuG0uxeQBFgh-e7ZHjo95RHv4YUhAg=&emci=d7f074d3-c3e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=67601c43-f0e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)**

clean_body: In state legislatures across the country, Republicans have introduced a record-breaking number of bills this year to restrict the right to vote. After losing the White House, Senate, and House last election, they're resorting to changing the rules in order to win. And the Supreme Court just ruled in their favor. The Supreme Court Deals A New Blow To Voting Rights, Upholding Arizona Restrictions Voting rights are under attack like never before, Peter. In state legislatures across the country, Republicans have introduced a record-breaking number of bills this year to restrict the right to vote. After losing the White House, Senate, and House last election, they're resorting to changing the rules in order to win. And the Supreme Court just ruled in their favor. Last week, the Supreme Court upheld two restrictive Arizona voting laws, gutting what remained of the crucial Voting Rights Act. It's now easier for lawmakers to restrict access to the ballot box for millions of Americans. | In Congress, Kim is fighting back against voter suppression to ensure that every American can make their voice heard. She joined her House colleagues in helping pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act and the For the People Act to prevent discrimination, end partisan gerrymandering, provide automatic voter registration, increase ballot box access, and so much more. But with the new Supreme Court ruling making it easier to attack the right to vote, it's more important than ever that sweeping voter protection legislation gets signed into law -- before it's too late. Thanks, Team Schrier National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **- ****July 9, 2021-** **\- INGOP Chair Admits Party Defunded the Police -** After a year of peddling misinformation and attacking Democrats on law enforcement, the Indiana Republican Party actually voted this year to defund the police. Indiana Republican Party Chair Kyle Hupfer openly admitted this in an op-ed earlier in the week as he explained the INGOP’s “NO” vote on the American Rescue Plan, which delivered $350 billion for law enforcement agencies to recruit new police officers and fight crime across the USA, including right here in Indiana. Hupfer and the Indiana Republican Party used the “price tag” of the American Rescue Plan as their excuse for their “NO” vote. Their logic is ironic, though, because Republicans were willing to give big corporations and the nation’s richest Americans a tax cut through the $2.2 trillion tax law a few years ago. And regardless of their partisan posturing, the fact remains clear: Indiana Republicans put their extreme partisanship ahead of our first responders, including the police. If the Indiana Republican Party truly supported law enforcement, they would have supported the American Rescue Plan and the direct relief it is bringing to first responders and Hoosier families across Indiana. Instead, Republicans are engaging in a campaign full of misinformation and extreme partisanship, and it’s harming the future of Indiana in the process. If there’s one thing to remember it’s that Democrats have delivered for Indiana’s law enforcement through decisive action. This kind of leadership is what responsible, thoughtful government looks like -- and it’s why Democrats will deliver these common-sense solutions at every opportunity. **\- Indiana Democrats Kick Off American Jobs Plan Tour ****-** This week, Indiana Democrats kicked off the American Jobs Plan Tour. The tour follows the successful American Rescue Plan Tour and will tell the story about *why* Indiana needs the Jobs Plan and *how* it will create a better future for Indiana and its families. The American Rescue Plan helped Indiana put COVID-19 in the rearview mirror, but it’s the American Jobs Plan that will take Indiana and Hoosier families to the next level. This means the upcoming Jobs Plan will create good-paying jobs, strengthen unions, and revitalize Indiana’s infrastructure -- including repairing crumbling roads and bridges, expanding broadband access, eliminating child care deserts, and improving health care access for the 500,000+ veterans who call Indiana home. Indiana Democrats are also working with our brothers and sisters in organized labor to pass the Protect the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, which will reverse the damage brought on by Indiana Republicans after their so-called “right to work” policies were signed into law nearly a decade ago. If Republicans say “NO” to the Jobs Plan, they will prove once again to be the party of extreme partisanship, blocking progress at every turn. Indiana Democrats are ready to deliver once again for Hoosier families, and it starts by passing the American Jobs Plan. It’s time to build a better future for Indiana. **\- County Party Summit -** ****_**-Save the date-**_ **Bartholomew County Democratic Party:** [BC Democratic Women at the Columbus Farmer's Market](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32141470/294848614/-1664642187?acontext=%7B%22event_action_history%22%3A\[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%7D\]%7D&FFF.07.09.21.=FFF.07.09.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjVlMGRiYy1mMGUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XVtlaZOd5QPwVrgjfk1QTUhCTfJyYBxidSQQHO-O4ro=&emci=620e8385-e2e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=925e0dbc-f0e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535), July 10, 9:00 - clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | - July 9, 2021- \- INGOP Chair Admits Party Defunded the Police - After a year of peddling misinformation and attacking Democrats on law enforcement, the Indiana Republican Party actually voted this year to defund the police. Indiana Republican Party Chair Kyle Hupfer openly admitted this in an op-ed earlier in the week as he explained the INGOP’s “NO” vote on the American Rescue Plan, which delivered $350 billion for law enforcement agencies to recruit new police officers and fight crime across the USA, including right here in Indiana. Hupfer and the Indiana Republican Party used the “price tag” of the American Rescue Plan as their excuse for their “NO” vote. Their logic is ironic, though, because Republicans were willing to give big corporations and the nation’s richest Americans a tax cut through the $2.2 trillion tax law a few years ago. And regardless of their partisan posturing, the fact remains clear: Indiana Republicans put their extreme partisanship ahead of our first responders, including the police. If the Indiana Republican Party truly supported law enforcement, they would have supported the American Rescue Plan and the direct relief it is bringing to first responders and Hoosier families across Indiana. Instead, Republicans are engaging in a campaign full of misinformation and extreme partisanship, and it’s harming the future of Indiana in the process. If there’s one thing to remember it’s that Democrats have delivered for Indiana’s law enforcement through decisive action. This kind of leadership is what responsible, thoughtful government looks like -- and it’s why Democrats will deliver these common-sense solutions at every opportunity. \- Indiana Democrats Kick Off American Jobs Plan Tour - This week, Indiana Democrats kicked off the American Jobs Plan Tour. The tour follows the successful American Rescue Plan Tour and will tell the story about why Indiana needs the Jobs Plan and how it will create a better future for Indiana and its families. The American Rescue Plan helped Indiana put COVID-19 in the rearview mirror, but it’s the American Jobs Plan that will take Indiana and Hoosier families to the next level. This means the upcoming Jobs Plan will create good-paying jobs, strengthen unions, and revitalize Indiana’s infrastructure -- including repairing crumbling roads and bridges, expanding broadband access, eliminating child care deserts, and improving health care access for the 500,000+ veterans who call Indiana home. Indiana Democrats are also working with our brothers and sisters in organized labor to pass the Protect the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, which will reverse the damage brought on by Indiana Republicans after their so-called “right to work” policies were signed into law nearly a decade ago. If Republicans say “NO” to the Jobs Plan, they will prove once again to be the party of extreme partisanship, blocking progress at every turn. Indiana Democrats are ready to deliver once again for Hoosier families, and it starts by passing the American Jobs Plan. It’s time to build a better future for Indiana. \- County Party Summit - **-Save the date- Bartholomew County Democratic Party: \[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%7D\]%7D&FFF.07.09.21.=FFF.07.09.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjVlMGRiYy1mMGUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XVtlaZOd5QPwVrgjfk1QTUhCTfJyYBxidSQQHO-O4ro=&emci=620e8385-e2e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=925e0dbc-f0e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535, July 10, 9:00 - 12:30 AM, 123 Washington St, Columbus, IN 47201 Wells County Democratic Party: , July 10, 8:30 - 10:00 AM, Wells County Democratic Party Headquarters, 119 S Johnson St, Bluffton, IN 46714 Cass County Democratic Party:, July 10, 9:00 - 10:00 AM, Black Dog Coffee, 116 S 6th St, Logansport, IN 46947 Vermillion County Democratic Party: \[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%7D\]%7D&FFF.07.09.21.=FFF.07.09.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjVlMGRiYy1mMGUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XVtlaZOd5QPwVrgjfk1QTUhCTfJyYBxidSQQHO-O4ro=&emci=620e8385-e2e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=925e0dbc-f0e0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535, July 10, 11:00 AM, Paradise Pizza, Bowling, and Lounge, 1702 St. Rd. 163 in Clinton, IN 47842 Third Congressional District Democrats: , July 11, 12:05 - 1:35 PM, Fort Wayne TinCaps, 1301 Ewing Street, Fort Wayne, IN 46802 Decatur County Democratic Party: Inclusivity Fair Float, July 11, 4:00 PM, Greensburg, IN, Contact Mimi Wadleigh-Pruett to participate. name: Tim Burchett
subject: Wokeism Is Coming For Our Passports 🛂
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=819037bc61b14c7492cfd9b660690959&_e=PqVX_4DV1UQIeZgi13W51g19SECOzM_7-0WfRCqoH4BKYqYj9-D4Xg9oAZC3HQQHhQ-6Dkk-bfYsuI3VUNl_R_aKp2a76ISrXtaGKL_UEhN0sbjxriSuPFCS6DDiwbrNi7a4UMhcy6DBs6wCVBWcbmZlMTYr0uTgBmdgkoVY-HF3PQ8tv9Uc-O2ZfGiFJEUtB1qVcuzMoSze2XhmjyF9O0VfByzY2DN93LoQKMRDVRUdqAMJfvRxvmq1kOWENVKGwr72Rlm8-u3E3t-YkVSJMAGT8CY12zXu99xSfHnDzbE%3D) **Wokeism Is Coming For Our Passports 🛂** [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=819037bc61b14c7492cfd9b660690959&_e=PqVX_4DV1UQIeZgi13W51uElQ9-d1uheLW9MpPvSlmBmPHK1_6ng4YWwFViGpVAvTkB7Q8mdGwuqfB6uSlWLkKBC5J9o5xda47HfRK_fxsfQqIqnwZsXEB2LIooEsYW5EaGpcQHeZlXnrRJGBeq55LoVZ2u7cTu8MYdWhjbjvD-t8PBWy9b1NUZWY5COjE-X5Gc-5c4Jq4m_NllI1pgrvZY8L5JZYMYAyDHNTk5moBxN3odTs0uOwzHW_dqCQgk_gexpaPv3JcFQIPatVe_zfynNjhzI6y3pWyPaCvLVDo0X6ucbMFBmN9R5fn4mKi8Um3jVc2vlpU9JycmS4MfEVr4bJnDf_7KsC2K-q9rbzys%3D) It could take you up to 18 weeks to get your passport thanks to heavy backlogs caused by COVID-19. But instead of focusing on clearing the backlog, the State Department is playing woke political games. Talk about misguided priorities. The State Department [recently announced](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=819037bc61b14c7492cfd9b660690959&_e=PqVX_4DV1UQIeZgi13W51muNSmzbKYXPXUOfmsCE14T-iCZpiw3eXMGuyyZP-PlO6dmbG8a43tVc4EXWXTNV60ZVtEkc96OK46tM_OcZs2F2qz0oM_8SrN7wdKqgHbZfcMPVEw1FaJYxSPZYdoH_TfS2jsAFUsW3wcbpglQGKBmxg-hY2VOA1SfaDiHLwhHm6cN37vOyMYHf2W5gePMMjbBAbN4veSs388a2df9qhzbsgguh5WfvnX5AfEehpds2IErMYcC5IkvGqzJYgulNsrYhzOc-_337uueJ8qO3rabgO7Jp6agtVAv0I5u75N78B-0bwO9_ArhD5OH6CBg3o8-wHPPYq5NR4N7ZSaxJFE7UfIT2AwUWUePiUCE_JnfbdYW09k_OAXG5jzT-gnzJeA%3D%3D) that passport applicants can now choose their gender without providing medical certification of their identity. The department will also soon roll out a non-binary gender option for applicants. As far as woke PR stunts go, this one takes the cake. As I told the [_New York Post_](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=819037bc61b14c7492cfd9b660690959&_e=PqVX_4DV1UQIeZgi13W51uElQ9-d1uheLW9MpPvSlmBmPHK1_6ng4YWwFViGpVAvTkB7Q8mdGwuqfB6uSlWLkKBC5J9o5xda47HfRK_fxsfQqIqnwZsXEB2LIooEsYW5EaGpcQHeZlXnrRJGBeq55FEyAeJuTGf4ACeLPks2FFqErtKnNp9GOkwLQx16PV9DjLke4JeBXrsDkqr852E7eNeKZFfsQCwhF-OHcYNppNPdycmzKVnhWU9mMb8VkkkpC2TeuO2EC7Vyg5OU4uHP8r0UFb2gTiGJhWbfPiuYShPrT5KQwOdtPCQ3WZYbISMIUj6uzMwdfLj-V75JZzuW0q2owu3hQ7nu7OCyTeb8X1Y%3D): _“It is grossly negligent to prioritize political correctness while folks in my district and around the country are missing travel arrangements for mission trips, vacations, and even final goodbyes with loved ones.”_ I tried to [pass](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=819037bc61b14c7492cfd9b660690959&_e=PqVX_4DV1UQIeZgi13W51uElQ9-d1uheLW9MpPvSlmBmPHK1_6ng4YWwFViGpVAvTkB7Q8mdGwuqfB6uSlWLkKBC5J9o5xda47HfRK_fxsfQqIqnwZsXEB2LIooEsYW5EaGpcQHeZlXnrRJGBeq55MoC6lYtm_PeMWtleCiF9RHI0_x1ZmLsKAz0otS1MHgoA5yHVXFMWpRDhi5Tlb3hbbktWZrOz-9bxiqqM7m_N3Penum5Mx941YbZ2Tv7sF_9gbcZiytvml78DOn0ygULe_6FyDAGlMdeWLBh_9BJ_c_6RN7ho_SQPMQY1nBH_E84BaLGMdKW9av7xByMe-hLikB8GiTRa6nQCtrbd0lmNIg%3D) an amendment blocking the State Department from moving forward with the change until it addresses the passport backlog. Of course, all the Democrats voted against my amendment. Joe Biden should focus on resolving the passport backlog instead of stoking the embers of this latest culture war. The quicker this issue is resolved, the quicker our economy returns to pre-pandemic levels. → **Read more:** GOP Rep. **Happy 100th Birthday To This Pearl Harbor Veteran 🎂**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=819037bc61b14c7492cfd9b660690959&_e=PqVX_4DV1UQIeZgi13W51sd6jXBRW3T4hZ6tJnMhauxqWB2MdYPd7swvMl5UQaKijQI4H2Cjbh7X6uQuBY5rZyh5Ut5DeNPNkbj8nv_F6BUOsm8QP6pQY8EWuzGIBOikTs6bTJoREulv3Jxxp5yDCmeJoUY77shBVu7vQqfnb2NrqbvuZcre6ya6JuVp1fPYvN0b8D7jI69JmI-nwIEdt5k8lnOKGn-nf0Up2ib2b-5SMBlcvK4I_1zgMoCcj7hCm7F60h6RNMkOSfNvGdbObq02S_YA7cvJ7pc8eYEog0UKfa9ssquPbsvBXu0kVku3CmWRYushUAGK2c_tlw6F0DXY8X2Wv_DonsSlVbST0Cg%3D)

A Knoxville resident and one of the few remaining survivors of Pearl Harbor turns 100 tomorrow. [Duward Swanson](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=819037bc61b14c7492cfd9b660690959&_e=PqVX_4DV1UQIeZgi13W51sd6jXBRW3T4hZ6tJnMhauxqWB2MdYPd7swvMl5UQaKijQI4H2Cjbh7X6uQuBY5rZyh5Ut5DeNPNkbj8nv_F6BUOsm8QP6pQY8EWuzGIBOikTs6bTJoREulv3Jxxp5yDCrP8j95Nuu7nDoKmRFCtNOiODvFIqJ0Abh1g1yF-BqwaBPGMsgax6lH14JPLvW9e2RSQbWyDyFX8Cq36RV0Wyb2HSfFCLJFcOFD3mxZduYWR_6DLHflUbftihHlwGgihUmbfuTHp1O4wswEs6AhFyFriw0MT76nrae_BIuyjhUlXVwkPfp1DDLiDGgga5_GxuY6kJKYFK2mlIouGZuBx-5M%3D) will be celebrating the milestone from Ben Atchley State Veterans Home, where well wishes have been pouring in for the American hero. Swanson can still recall the Pearl Harbor attack in detail: “I went up Hangar Avenue, bombs falling. It’s a wonder I hadn’t got killed. Bullets, flying all around.” After the military, Swanson pursued his love of music, becoming a front man for Hank Williams. He’ll sing for you – you just have to ask!

I announced that I am SUING Facebook, Twitter, and Google for unconstitutionally censoring ME and other conservatives around the Nation.

**My team is demanding an end to the shadow banning, a stop to the silencing, a stop to the blacklisting, vanishing, and canceling.** We will not rest until we've achieved a MAJOR VICTORY for the American People.

subject: It’s time to take matters into our own hands

body:
If Dems won’t secure our borders, then we are going to have to find a way to do it ourselves. | |
---
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=dd25523b1e8b4a4bb2fb30fd3b02bd38&_e=CLuQl8Ied10sRB52CbL-O98f_ahj8ZKDt5iBMupVr4X-P7k4sDF_ZA6xm7Avov8yXiHtchQTWsXgYpcQCT3aNX-VXt9rgWgULiVwAQtM5UD3JCXtkEVT4LGZw-cbDUDIz8xlMoNBhbk572KNCn-SXH9_xqq-6w68iEPTUxgxLn1o80QslhvijfOQYOEYpQvoWNbRHpCEz6P0-DQVCRr9Z8IQPQ4qShrnlSLkx62Y4G_2eXS2n3YVBcFegD1-zp-8awVuJJB_qNhAGhafqQa8eXhBXjI_3eBYYO8rZdj2vOfl6lgxvsixwEKtPtnNeWZEGsIIuv8xSqlQoInlFzpk2cA64LIgINUJREK4KOCAUcNreJYA07uPzU7OLSYUuo-g6Plr7y-rtISJSiBJjgkQ7U_Qnu3pJ06euHmW7o-3m3cbyM8V6G3-2jyK1lEF3DvnlIPt-JKk9xl_Ng5L1sMUHMm0AQIlHZTYnPtgg6oZJuxzxh4C9LUqFnl_6T2C1oD8)
|
---
Hey Peter,

Washington Dems are failing American families.

Their open border policies are costing us a fortune and threatening the safety of our communities. What’s worse, they’ve seen how bad things are at our border, and they REFUSE to clean up their own mess.

**If Kamala and Joe won’t secure our borders, then we are going to have to find a way to do it ourselves. **

And Peter, I came up with a plan to do just that. Let me introduce to you the ‘Real SOB with the Government Act.’
|
---
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=dd25523b1e8b4a4bb2fb30fd3b02bd38&_e=CLuQl8Ied10sRB52CbL-O98f_ahj8ZKDt5iBMupVr4X-P7k4sDF_ZA6xm7Avov8yXiHtchQTWsXgYpcQCT3aNX-VXt9rgWgULiVwAQtM5UD3JCXtkEVT4LGZw-cbDUDIz8xlMoNBhbk572KNCn-SXH9_xqq-6w68iEPTUxgxLn1o80QslhvijfOQYOEYpQvoWNbRHpCEz6P0-DQVCRr9Z8IQPQ4qShrnlSLkx62Y4G_2eXS2n3YVBcFegD1-zp-8awVuJJB_qNhAGhafqQa8eXhBXjI_3eBYYO8rZdj2vOddhpBl0ahW2Ott7wfe8aeA8efjYnoXQ4xtrU5Fg17Nh3f5nt9gwQRsaLyFzUXXpTrIV1lWKDRIlwznFNrt8hGoSScG2n6sHEZoMi6nuc66p983_12u0SQZ6-yD-t6v9YcZwwKoXVK7yOybvDANB8WaJvHl_HeydK2Mhr31r6iYzIpx18IRW6JuYcK7YtMEbvXlruC6k2DLpmpyI5_wfrXi)
|
---
American families NEED a solution that will fix our border crisis. I think my proposed policy is that solution. Now, we just need to find a Member of Congress to sponsor it.

_That’s exactly why I’m reaching out to you, Peter._

I’m trying to get the word out about my plan to fix the border crisis, but I need your help.

**Can I count on you to share this video and help me spread the word?**
|
---
[**SHARE THE VIDEO**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=dd25523b1e8b4a4bb2fb30fd3b02bd38&_e=CLuQl8Ied10sRB52CbL-O98f_ahj8ZKDt5iBMupVr4X-P7k4sDF_ZA6xm7Avov8yXiHtchQTWsXgYpcQCT3aNX-VXt9rgWgULiVwAQtM5UD3JCXtkEVT4LGZw-cbDUDIz8xlMoNBhbk572KNCn-SXH9_xqq-6w68iEPTUxgxLn1o80QslhvijfOQYOEYpQvoWNbRHpCEz6P0-DQVCRr9Z8IQPQ4qShrnlSLkx62Y4G_2eXS2n3YVBcFegD1-zp-8awVuJJB_qNhAGhafqQa8eXhBXjI_3eBYYO8rZdj2vOdV9-IDX0unZQ0swAjjYQ7bkMI1ft1Au5OGrBUM779jJ52d9EsamkdNZrqwkCUKghTZwai9WXoP7vf7oQWU3VNlgqhycJaV_a9YYi6r_82n_1euaxGCCjE2hg_2zNM1qkd66LWLVo03aRu234KVpB08FwEhd5EKQNHLmYrLpAdhRjZB6CHbg3VJppdnozh1R0bs0CU7MSiT31bJfZG0d-iX)
|

Kamala and Joe aren’t keeping our families safe, so it’s time we do something about it.

In freedom,
Harold Earls
---
|

Harold Earls is a husband, a father, and a 9th generation Georgian. He knows that good ol' boy politics are dragging our state backward and leaving our families behind. Peter,

My name is Major General Michael “Mick” McGuire, USAF (Ret.) and I’m running against Chuck Schumer’s righthand man – Mark Kelly – in the critical Arizona U.S. Senate race that WILL DETERMINE the outcome of the majority.

Peter, I jumped in this race because I have what it takes to protect our conservative values from the radical left.

As a former F-16 pilot and retired commanding general of the Arizona National Guard, I know what it takes to lead a team and protect a community.

Washington is broken and I need your help to fix it. body:
You know you're doing something right when you make the Republicans mad
#

Folks,
You know you're doing something right when you make the Republicans mad.
Today, the NRSC (the Republican Party's Senate campaign arm) launched a completely unhinged attack on my work to dismantle their stranglehold on our government and return power to working people.
They claimed my eight-point agenda to save our democracy will turn America into a "far-left nation."
**This is just another day of their fear-mongering, folks. We cannot let the GOP write the narrative of our fight to make our democracy work for working people.**
[So I'm personally asking you to help me fight back against this attack. We cannot let the GOP write the narrative of our fight to make our democracy work for working people. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = For the record, I won’t be taking any advice on how to secure our democracy from insurrectionists and the sedition-curious. I’ve been unequivocal in pushing back against the GOP's lies about the last election, and I promise that I’ll keep that same energy when I’m in the US Senate. Thanks in advance for helping us fight back today. \- Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Team Crist
subject: our environment is our greatest treasure
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
From the vast array of marine life to our beautiful beaches and the Everglades that exist nowhere else on Earth, we have _a lot_ to be in awe of.
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FYrOzELbNOCFH3JJKlcjsg==/N7-Lz9vCzGN07DinK8HsUQ==?refcode=20210708_f_1_fl&amount=25)
---
Friend,

It's no secret that **Florida has one of the most amazing natural environments** anywhere in the country. From the vast array of marine life to our beautiful beaches and the Everglades that exist nowhere else on Earth, we have _a lot_ to be in awe of.

Our environment is one of our greatest treasures, and protecting it is an incredibly important job. Unfortunately, **Ron DeSantis has failed.** From his total lack of action on climate change to his complete failure to protect our beaches and natural springs, DeSantis has made it clear that our environment is not a priority.
[DONATE TO HELP CHARLIE DEFEAT RON DESANTIS!](https://act.myngp.com/el/FYrOzELbNOCFH3JJKlcjsg==/N7-Lz9vCzGN07DinK8HsUQ==?refcode=20210708_f_1_fl&amount=25)
---
Charlie is different. In Congress, he was endorsed by groups like the **Sierra Club, the League of Conservation Voters, and the Democratic Environmental Caucus of Florida (DECF)**. He won their support because of his long record of fighting to protect our environment -- and he's not going to stop.

**Florida is Charlie 's home** \-- he knows how special it is and how crucial it is that we protect our natural environment. As governor, he'll work to protect our state from climate change and preserve our environment for generations to come -- but he needs your help to win this race first.

**Will you pitch in to Charlie 's campaign today to help him defeat Ron DeSantis and make Florida's environment a priority as our next governor?**

body:
#

Friends — this isn’t the news we were hoping to share, especially after the amazing month we just had, but we think you should see this.
_CNN_ just released an article titled **The 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022** ....and we are on the list. Here’s a paragraph from the article on our race:
_“Republicans are no longer without candidates to take on Democratic Sen. Mark Kelly, who is running for a full six-year term after winning last fall.”_
We made Arizona history when we won in 2020, but now Mark needs your help to hold this seat and fend off attacks from National Republicans.
This is not the list we wanted to be on as we head into the election next year. So we’re reaching out for your help to raise $10,000 today in response to this news so we can stay ahead of the Republicans who want to defeat us.

Articles like this make us a top target of Mitch McConnell and we need your help to prepare for the next wave of attack ads.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210709-1-15&t=1&refcode2=925_6688874_rNJpcF&akid=925%2E6688874%2ErNJpcF)

clean_body: Liberal Republicans hated every word of it. | Peter, I was honored to join President Trump in Florida for his most recent rally. During my speech, I said that it’s not enough to simply elect Republicans next year. We need warriors like President Trump to fight for our principles. That’s why I became National Chair of pro-Trump, battle-tested Navy SEAL Eric Greitens’ Senate campaign in the must-win OPEN race in Missouri. When Eric Greitens asked if I would be the National Chair of his Senate campaign, I emphatically said, “YES!” That’s because I know he is a pro-Trump Navy SEAL and a true conservative ready to take the fight to Kamala in the Senate and support our shared values. And just like President Trump, Eric has been relentlessly slandered and attacked by Democrats, left-wing prosecutors, and the fake news media. I fully trust Eric to fight for us on issues like illegal immigration, election integrity, our free speech and constitutional rights, and draining the swamp of corruption that plagues D.C. He fought for our country as a Navy SEAL. He’s fought against George Soros and liberal Republicans like the Lincoln Project. There’s no doubt in my mind that he will fight for our America First agenda in the Senate. Thank you, Kimberly Guilfoyle National Chair Greitens for U.S. Senate Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Tom Nelson
subject: Maria’s story, and the story of millions of other Americans, are why I support Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Listen,

Last week, I shared a deeply personal video with my wife Maria, a cancer survivor, about why our country has a moral obligation to implement Medicare for All as soon as possible. The video plays off the famous _Harry and Louise_ ad that special interests used to crush health reform in the 1990s.

That commercial tried to scare people into accepting our broken for-profit healthcare system by fear-mongering. Nearly 30 years later, it’s more clear than ever that it's our cruel current system that's generating backbreaking bills.

[Let us know here if you agree that every person deserves health care without the possibility of financially ruinous debt!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32145311/294861379/-1596996217?refcode=TN_EM_SV_1MO_210709_1_1&refcode2=c6b71b3b-fee0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmI3MWIzYi1mZWUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MG4io4Atv516JXPBogvDANiJpRjJGNU3C1SPc_BH-vE=&emci=5fc79d8a-fce0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c6b71b3b-fee0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32145316/294861382/-1596996217?refcode=TN_EM_SV_1MO_210709_1_1&refcode2=c6b71b3b-fee0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmI3MWIzYi1mZWUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MG4io4Atv516JXPBogvDANiJpRjJGNU3C1SPc_BH-vE=&emci=5fc79d8a-fce0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c6b71b3b-fee0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925)
Dealing with cancer is deeply painful, and the last thing families want to be worrying about during treatment is their financial future. While we were lucky that Maria was able to get treatment without being bankrupted by medical bills, so many families are not so fortunate.

Shockingly, a 2019 study concluded that 66.5% of all personal bankruptcies are tied to medical debt — nearly two-thirds of the total!

Meanwhile, the healthcare and pharmaceutical industries are busy monetizing that suffering by gouging desperate sick people through sky-high drug prices and insurance premiums.

Here in America, we are getting worse care for higher prices than anywhere else in the developed world. The stakes are too high to continue to let special interests drown our political system in cash to keep their deadly system in place.

One of the reasons I’m running for Senate is to change our healthcare system to ensure that no one has to choose between medical care and crushing debt. **Maria’s story,_and the story of millions of other Americans_ , are why I support Medicare for All.**

[But, I’m writing this email to get your take; you know where Maria and I stand. Do you support Medicare for All?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32145323/294861390/-1596996217?refcode=TN_EM_SV_1MO_210709_1_1&refcode2=c6b71b3b-fee0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmI3MWIzYi1mZWUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MG4io4Atv516JXPBogvDANiJpRjJGNU3C1SPc_BH-vE=&emci=5fc79d8a-fce0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c6b71b3b-fee0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925)
| | [YES!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32145325/294861394/-1596996217?refcode=TN_EM_SV_1MO_210709_1_1&refcode2=c6b71b3b-fee0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmI3MWIzYi1mZWUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MG4io4Atv516JXPBogvDANiJpRjJGNU3C1SPc_BH-vE=&emci=5fc79d8a-fce0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c6b71b3b-fee0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32145326/294861396/-1596996217?refcode=TN_EM_SV_1MO_210709_1_1&refcode2=c6b71b3b-fee0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmI3MWIzYi1mZWUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MG4io4Atv516JXPBogvDANiJpRjJGNU3C1SPc_BH-vE=&emci=5fc79d8a-fce0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c6b71b3b-fee0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925)
---

Let me break it down in a different way. I support Medicare for All because:
* No Americans should worry about losing health insurance when they lose a job.
* No Americans should be one fall or one slip away from bankruptcy.
* No Americans should hesitate to retire just because they’re years away from Medicare.

I’ve spent my entire career working for working people and I’m determined to bring that focus to the U.S. Senate. **In my opinion, that starts with advocating for Medicare for All.** [Do you agree?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32145327/294861397/-1596996217?refcode=TN_EM_SV_1MO_210709_1_1&refcode2=c6b71b3b-fee0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmI3MWIzYi1mZWUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MG4io4Atv516JXPBogvDANiJpRjJGNU3C1SPc_BH-vE=&emci=5fc79d8a-fce0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c6b71b3b-fee0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925)
| [Where do you stand?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32145329/294861398/-1596996217?refcode=TN_EM_SV_1MO_210709_1_1&refcode2=c6b71b3b-fee0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmI3MWIzYi1mZWUwLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MG4io4Atv516JXPBogvDANiJpRjJGNU3C1SPc_BH-vE=&emci=5fc79d8a-fce0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c6b71b3b-fee0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925)
---

Thank you for hearing me out,

Tom Nelson

|
---

Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. clean_body: | | Listen, Last week, I shared a deeply personal video with my wife Maria, a cancer survivor, about why our country has a moral obligation to implement Medicare for All as soon as possible. The video plays off the famous Harry and Louise ad that special interests used to crush health reform in the 1990s. That commercial tried to scare people into accepting our broken for-profit healthcare system by fear-mongering. Nearly 30 years later, it’s more clear than ever that it's our cruel current system that's generating backbreaking bills. Dealing with cancer is deeply painful, and the last thing families want to be worrying about during treatment is their financial future. While we were lucky that Maria was able to get treatment without being bankrupted by medical bills, so many families are not so fortunate. Shockingly, a 2019 study concluded that 66.5% of all personal bankruptcies are tied to medical debt — nearly two-thirds of the total! Meanwhile, the healthcare and pharmaceutical industries are busy monetizing that suffering by gouging desperate sick people through sky-high drug prices and insurance premiums. Here in America, we are getting worse care for higher prices than anywhere else in the developed world. The stakes are too high to continue to let special interests drown our political system in cash to keep their deadly system in place. One of the reasons I’m running for Senate is to change our healthcare system to ensure that no one has to choose between medical care and crushing debt. Maria’s story,and the story of millions of other Americans , are why I support Medicare for All. | | | Let me break it down in a different way. I support Medicare for All because: No Americans should worry about losing health insurance when they lose a job. No Americans should be one fall or one slip away from bankruptcy. No Americans should hesitate to retire just because they’re years away from Medicare. I’ve spent my entire career working for working people and I’m determined to bring that focus to the U.S. Senate. In my opinion, that starts with advocating for Medicare for All. | Thank you for hearing me out, Tom Nelson | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin ** Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

Will you pitch in $5, $10, $15 or even $20 immediately to help fund our efforts?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=bce11863a5944eb498afd2db617ea2f0&_e=oA6HloyX35oeCjlwTtRxKvQ6Sk9wz5b6q9dsnkGHXQHUQpDr2ono22dctC7T4hHleX1Ciz_W1eTrgRWck5jkwlNEuRjQLB7D7WcHTNsfPhHy15e0iqUDcz1mX_eABD-y3f_KV_B-9Sk8uyPCS3jGjHi9AB7NoIHpwOsba1tx5nRR8pICqCJydxy9Xyz0wboWmrzFebeJ-_TaLJbqE-prooLHceTQyzvxkpjHqwOOERVmckw2bnNgDIR6nataOM8hMzPcum1uNhigOLg_3ALHhnJMShrdMUaSPPieMEsnhdbFvrW3k8dAnZ2zLgPsEWt72HY4fKP5GPHfBNE790cRKimtiC00vLhcA8Ju9eU9YwUTR53qme5B_X11wt2TGZSWXlnbE0wTiwsAxacBHiRTNDemZG8-GkXYLsnnSBP5wUm-JKwQde905prNCdaAABAP)**

clean_body: the company behind Keystone XL is suing the United States for $15 BILLION in damages, which taxpayers like you and I will be responsible for. | Fellow Conservative, On President Biden’s first day in office, he revoked a permit for the Keystone XL Pipeline. KILLING thousands of good-paying jobs. Now, the company behind Keystone XL is suing the United States for $15 BILLION in damages - which taxpayers like you and I will be responsible for. Joe Biden canceled the Keystone XL pipeline to pursue his far-Left anti-energy agenda and Americans are feeling the detrimental effects. Skyrocketing gas prices across the nation, tens of thousands of jobs lost and failed energy independence... Fellow Conservative, this is just the beginning of the slippery slope of Democrat control in Washington. While our nation is trying to bounce back from the damages experienced throughout the COVID-19 pandemic, Joe Biden chooses to put his job-killing radical agenda before the American people. It’s time we stand up! We need to reinvigorate the economy, the job market and the American spirit and the way to do that is making our conservative values and agenda the majority in Washington. | | | | | | Thank you, Senator Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Fellow Conservative,

My name is Major General Michael “Mick” McGuire, USAF (Ret.) and I’m running against Chuck Schumer’s righthand man – Mark Kelly – in the critical Arizona U.S. Senate race that WILL DETERMINE the outcome of the majority.

Fellow Conservative, I jumped in this race because I have what it takes to protect our conservative values from the radical left.

As a former F-16 pilot and retired commanding general of the Arizona National Guard, I know what it takes to lead a team and protect a community.

Washington is broken and I need your help to fix it. [**Will you take my 2021 Senate Priorities Survey, so I know what is most important to YOU ahead of this critical election?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5f0db1a8720e451a8ee2aedf016ccc56&_e=KO9prOdezc1Lc8Vuj_e_aWowebKgf8iI5_zgUCiBQrkBd5Bqs4iruvmORxP28fqEa5btFtPmKfeg08m3eSCIz_CdPcQwsEwLTuQ-i_5nhw5O5hpEBGTQdHeLBDQsi1DykWiZguRQIf1vByMOXh5OzInVmnDy8C1YjkFGwffe66I052W2KPGK_Sj4iSVSkVnwrfaC-BrM75W-DEkaq2D5vBNeBhgATwhgOSW26mhSvySd6jTjvpdxuqNdbCbxi-zHE_5yxfsdmt2FSuALU_-Sv3dgKCj0spdWRv1V10iGI7suEVhPeJSSlwGEdEdn00RCxCesaORap0lWiJ516AN_Wuf5JOebkG8CpC4Tf34gP-dYgqhJOZEiX2v8wZiK9LefKtgYuCyvWaSiX2VYTyy1uYR20MNWOowvjhNLAJwCccU2yJrDLYHciy9Uk7QTnnb126QM6ouGTPgPhua1EtmnEOn0poYtyyEZISAb2FUkhonE1kVdU3hNRsAnR5m_cR3E0O_DdPZhIVqoJupPXwJHodpxqjjl-ZJml26JOyNKW_WH_rRPBKag-Qx84_o91p0fpukU6Lp41mBlDfhl1qQjI8fHkepuD9B_EbPFnzX-EWA%3D)

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5f0db1a8720e451a8ee2aedf016ccc56&_e=KO9prOdezc1Lc8Vuj_e_aWowebKgf8iI5_zgUCiBQrkBd5Bqs4iruvmORxP28fqEa5btFtPmKfeg08m3eSCIz_CdPcQwsEwLTuQ-i_5nhw5O5hpEBGTQdHeLBDQsi1DykWiZguRQIf1vByMOXh5OzInVmnDy8C1YjkFGwffe66I052W2KPGK_Sj4iSVSkVnwrfaC-BrM75W-DEkaq2D5vBNeBhgATwhgOSW26mhSvySd6jTjvpdxuqNdbCbxi-zHE_5yxfsdmt2FSuALU_-Sv3dgKCj0spdWRv1V10iGI7suEVhPeJSSlwGEdEdn00RCxCesaORap0lWiJ516AN_Wuf5JOebkG8CpC4Tf34gP-dYgqhJOZEiX2v8wZiK9LefKtgYuCyvWaSiX2VYTyy1ueBBd2knsJHl3dpny9EiotCifLrjfuXUvqtrpK_c0kiCa7b2Grja_TKxT16SDlr1nl3H8ldUPEoiB-qLelDZLZxyjK27nDE-QRitlZVCkZjQ78e0acZ4UrX5tfSbKWfYlUr_lLPrWJoqCPBw9-RdCaFokXvIim_HBMGe8V05Gpt-0savpNxP5WrbBQCgmcoWYUCJOPjT8A8L5H9WB3QXhxY%3D)

Each day the left pushed our country further left. Mark Kelly said he’s for the people – but all he’s shown is he’s willing to vote with Chuck Schumer 100% of the time.

Arizona and our country deserve better.

We can win this race and win back the Senate majority – but I need to hear from you today. Fellow Conservative, I jumped in this race because I have what it takes to protect our conservative values from the radical left. As a former F-16 pilot and retired commanding general of the Arizona National Guard, I know what it takes to lead a team and protect a community. Washington is broken and I need your help to fix it. Each day the left pushed our country further left. Mark Kelly said he’s for the people – but all he’s shown is he’s willing to vote with Chuck Schumer 100% of the time. Arizona and our country deserve better. We can win this race and win back the Senate majority – but I need to hear from you today. Thank you, Maj. Gen. Michael "Mick" McGuire USAF (Ret.) | Maj. Gen. Exciting news -- Democrat Val Demings just announced her Senate campaign to take on far-right Republican Marco Rubio in Florida! Florida’s last Senate race was decided by just 0.2%, so it’s no surprise that pundits say this race will be a top battleground this cycle. With Florida’s pricey media markets and margins like 0.2%, Val cannot win -- and oust Rubio -- without your help. **[Will you please become one of the first donors to Val’s campaign by splitting $5 or more right now between Val Demings’s campaign and mine? Every dollar you give will go toward winning in Florida and defending our narrow Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32146631/294865630/358321064?refcode=e20210709&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODhkNGFhMi0wM2UxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_taIV42z1rUAMKE88vU2MQQ1KLxutkyPV1b-r4FDaNo=)** Val has dedicated her career to public service -- she’s been a social worker, a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. name: Walt Blackman | AZ Conservative
subject: Why Kamala Harris won’t go to the Border ⬇
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walt Blackman for Congress |
body:
| |
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57907031:JBYkGJlNb:m:1:3253819041:3C39E4A6FEC70790A7DE8DDD63B16E46:r)
|
---
Hi Peter,

My name is Walt Blackman, I'm a combat veteran, a conservative Patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona's 2nd Congressional District.

I was recently on _Newsmax_ calling out Kamala Harris for the open border anarchy unfolding at our southern borderー _[**Check it out now >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57907031:JBYkGJlNb:m:1:3253819041:3C39E4A6FEC70790A7DE8DDD63B16E46:r)_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57907031:JBYkGJlNb:m:1:3253819041:3C39E4A6FEC70790A7DE8DDD63B16E46:r)

[**WATCH THE CLIP**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57907031:JBYkGJlNb:m:1:3253819041:3C39E4A6FEC70790A7DE8DDD63B16E46:r)
Peter, I've been to the border, and I've seen this crisis with my own eyes, and let me tell you, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden have made this situation **a clear and present danger to our country!**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57907031:JBYkGJlNb:m:1:3253819041:3C39E4A6FEC70790A7DE8DDD63B16E46:r)
Being from Arizona, living near the border, I can tell you what's really happening down here:
-> U.S. Border Patrol is completely **_OVERWHELMED. _**
-> There are **_3,000_** **_ILLEGAL CROSSINGS_** per day.
-> We **_CAN 'T CONTROL_** who is coming into our country.

** ****_" Without borders, we don't have a country"_**_\- President Trump._

[**DEFEND AMERICA 'S BORDERS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57907031:JBYkGJlNb:m:1:3253819041:3C39E4A6FEC70790A7DE8DDD63B16E46:r)
President Trump was exactly right. And that's exactly the kind of mess that Biden and Harris have created here in Arizona.

**That's why I'm running for Congress to defend America 's borders, just like I defended our country abroad. **

**__[Help send me to Congress to Defend America 's Borders by DONATING to my fight NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57907031:JBYkGJlNb:m:1:3253819041:3C39E4A6FEC70790A7DE8DDD63B16E46:r)__**

_Want to hear the rest of my story? _

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57907031:JBYkGJlNb:m:1:3253819041:3C39E4A6FEC70790A7DE8DDD63B16E46:r)

I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.
My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was _**the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**_

You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.

_**We believe in Freedom.**_

**We don 't believe in burning down monuments...**

**We don 't believe in burning our flag... **

**We stand up for our flag!**

**And we stand up for the United States of America!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57907031:JBYkGJlNb:m:1:3253819041:3C39E4A6FEC70790A7DE8DDD63B16E46:r)

I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I 've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link:****_[https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2491200/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57907031:JBYkGJlNb:m:1:3253819041:3C39E4A6FEC70790A7DE8DDD63B16E46:r)_**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman
|
---
[**Support My Fight for Freedom**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57907031:JBYkGJlNb:m:1:3253819041:3C39E4A6FEC70790A7DE8DDD63B16E46:r)
---
Pictures taken in uniform while Walt was in active service does not imply DOD or military endorsement.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: They sneak around in the dead of night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
The audit is bringing sunlight |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f36be6e38e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

We all know that the Democrats love operating in the dead of night.

**That’s how no one can see their dirty deeds.**

_And that is exactly what we are seeing happen AGAIN!_

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Original “Election Integrity” Conservative leading the charge against Election Fraud in Arizona via _America’s Audit._

**We have found evidence of untold fraud in the 2020 election, and we are just beginning.**

There are three steps to our plan:
1. Finish America’s Audit in Arizona.
2. Spread America’s Audit to other states, including Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Georgia.
3. Ensure that future elections are protected!

**And the last part is key! None of this matters if the Democrats can do it again!**

_This is why I am writing you today._

We are making strong fundraising strides, but it is nothing compared to the Socialist Billionaire dollars that back our opponents.

**We are spearheading a tremendous grassroots movement that will defeat the Radical Left. But when it is grassroots versus the Swamp, Crony Billionaires, and Big Tech, we need big dollars.**

**_There is no other way. My campaign has been grassroots from the beginning, and it will ALWAYS be that way!_**

But for us to stay the huge grassroots movement that we have become, that means every donation, great, and small, will help us.

**It also means that we need the help to sustain the momentum, so we can FINISH America’s Audit, we can AUDIT the other states, and we can protect America’s elections from the DEMOCRATS!**

[Will you help me?

_Donate as much as you can to defend America’s elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e4294d0c30&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=987224ae84&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **After finding many discrepancies and issues with the 2020 election in Maricopa County, and use of a THIRD PARTY professional auditor, using read-only software, the Radical Left says they won’t use the Dominion machines anymore.**

Hmm...

Let me ask you a question. Which do you think is more likely?

That they are actually removing Dominion software because it could have been tampered in a third-party read-only audit?

**Or that the Democrats are using this as an excuse to remove fraudulent software and blame the Republicans all in one go?**

Wait a minute, you don’t need to answer that question – it’s plain as day.

**Right now, as a result of the Maricopa Election Audit,_America’s_ _Audit_ , they are scrambling to cover their tracks.**

_If this really was the issues, why couldn’t they have given up the passwords so auditors can examine the machines?_

**This doesn’t make any sense if you take them at face value.**

**_But when you realize the massive fraud Secretary of State Hobbs and the Democrat Swamp are covering up, well... it begins to make a lot more sense._**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2d759dcd6d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **_This is classic Democrat propaganda._**

After abusing an entirely fraudulent system with terrible machines, they say they are going to get rid of them, and blame the Republicans while they are doing that!

**I have been fighting against this Democrat propaganda from day 1, and I know how the game is played!**
1. **Republicans investigate**
2. **Democrats cover their rears.**
3. **Democrats blame Republicans.**

How long do they think Republicans will stay silent on this?

**It is up to this grassroots movement and Conservatives like you to say NO to the Democrats and refuse to buy into their B.S.**

[Will you help me?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7d0e423ac5&e=44b8c466b0)

_[Donate TODAY to stop the Radical Left from stealing our elections!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2aa5baf519&e=44b8c466b0)_

**While others remained silent after November 3rd, I stood up to be the vote of the voters. There would not have been a full-day Public Hearing on Election Integrity if I had not stood up to the establishment leaders in Arizona.**

_The establishment wanted to bury the fraud, incompetence, and mismanagement of the 2020 Presidential election in Arizona, but I said NOT ON MY WATCH! I was denied the use of the House of Representative hearing rooms, but we found another venue._

**This was so important that I fronted the cost myself. I am glad that a select group of legislators had the courage to join me and pursue the truth knowing they would face ridicule and harassment. We listened to our constituents when others blew them off.**

**_So do you want a Secretary of State that listens to constituents, gives them a voice in the process, and takes action or one who was part of the problem?_**

You have seen the attacks against me and you have seen what I have done.

**If I can do all of this as a representative in the Arizona House,[imagine what I could do as Secretary of State](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=23020c3bc4&e=44b8c466b0)?**

_My heart is on the table. I have bled for Election Integrity, and I will continue the fight no matter what!_

For our children, for our grandchildren.

**To all the Democrats who want to steal our Freedoms away from us, I have one thing to say.**

**_Not on my watch._**

[_Donate today to help support our campaign!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d06db04d0e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2896e2e5e5&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f29cb98d2b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=5b797f366b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=5b797f366b).
