name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Big Tech lawsuit FILED - Free speech on the line Peter
body:
Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. For almost an entire year, big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook, and Google have silenced and censored millions of conservative Americans for speaking freely or questioning the government-approved "opinions" on the coronavirus or the 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough, we've now uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with these Big Tech corporations to de-platform and silence conservatives for raising legitimate concerns over the integrity of the 2020 election. ** ** **In other words, we 've caught big government unconstitutionally colluding with big tech to silence their political opponents...** And unless folks like you and me take immediate action to stop this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. [**That is why I am urgently asking you and every other American patriot reading this letter to contribute $35 or more to help us sue Twitter and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57906318:JAKBIJlnN:m:1:3253819041:8D9777E11C7F60AA4A555E7325BB63FD:r) Let me explain... In 2018, the state government of California created the Office of Elections Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on election laws and procedures. And as any sensible person could predict, this office quickly devolved into a political weapon for censorship by the far-left Secretary of State's Office. The reason I mention this is because this past February, conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley logged onto Twitter when he found that he had been banned from Twitter for violating the governments "rules about election integrity". [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57906318:JAKBIJlnN:m:1:3253819041:8D9777E11C7F60AA4A555E7325BB63FD:r) You see, from November 2020 to February 2021, Rogan tweeted a series of messages expressing his concerns over the dubious presidential election procedures and skepticism over the results. And every time he made a statement that was deemed a "violation", it was promptly removed from Twitter. But that is not the worst of it... Recently, documents were found showing that leftist operatives within the Election Cybersecurity office flagged Rogan's tweets as "misinformation" and coded it as an "orange" level threat indicating problematic speech. _**Then it happened ...**_ After Rogan dared to question the legitimacy of the number of votes Joe Biden received during the election, Twitter permanently suspended Rogan altogether. Hopefully I don't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs and opinions is a gross violation of our freedom of speech. But Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and followed by more than four hundred thousand people. So, it was clear that the only reason his account was suspended was because left was worried that Rogan's tweets could damage Joe Biden's image. In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden. The liberal elites responsible for de-platforming Rogan were also worries that his tweets would destroy the image of then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla - _who at the time was being considered to fill Kamala Harris ' vacated Senate seat. _ It's doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between big government and big tech to silence political opponents is corrupt and wildly unconstitutional. **And that 's why me and my team of superb constitutional lawyers are suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault on the First Amendment. ** ** ** [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57906318:JAKBIJlnN:m:1:3253819041:8D9777E11C7F60AA4A555E7325BB63FD:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty to defend our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties from the corporations, politicians, socialist revolutionaries, and inept or bias government officials who try to infringe them. But I'll be honest with you, I never thought the assault on our individual rights would become this bad. Not only are we suing Twitter - a multi-billion-dollar corporation - for their gross infringement on Rogan's First Amendment right to free speech... We are simultaneously taking on the former-Secretary of State of California Alex Padilla for blatantly colluding with Twitter to silence conservative Americans for sharing their political opinions. **And even though we intend to win, this will be the hardest legal battle we 've ever fought.** You see, as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the help of like-minded conservative patriots like yourself. _ _ _And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000._ _ _ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a one-time contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57906318:JAKBIJlnN:m:1:3253819041:8D9777E11C7F60AA4A555E7325BB63FD:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, corporations, and government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still the master of our own lives? [**I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing any amount to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57906318:JAKBIJlnN:m:1:3253819041:8D9777E11C7F60AA4A555E7325BB63FD:r) Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures lambasted President Trump for the completely bogus allegations that he colluded with a foreign power to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech billionaires to influence the 2020 election, those same leftists are completely silent. I don't know about you, but I am fed up with the left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and flagrant unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57906318:JAKBIJlnN:m:1:3253819041:8D9777E11C7F60AA4A555E7325BB63FD:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57906318:JAKBIJlnN:m:1:3253819041:8D9777E11C7F60AA4A555E7325BB63FD:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57906318:JAKBIJlnN:m:1:3253819041:8D9777E11C7F60AA4A555E7325BB63FD:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57906318:JAKBIJlnN:m:1:3253819041:8D9777E11C7F60AA4A555E7325BB63FD:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57906319:JAKBIJlnN:m:1:3253819041:8D9777E11C7F60AA4A555E7325BB63FD:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

---

subject: Big Opportunity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
I’ll be very brief here... The email below speaks for itself. Our campaign recently earned the support of Kansas Republican icons Bob Dole and....... Friend, I’ll be very brief here... name: Team AOC
subject: Ocean on fire. Cities flooding. Infrastructure melting.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210709-2269-header&t=1&akid=2269%2E2526796%2EjNMFCB)
In the past few weeks alone, we’ve seen:
The ocean _on fire_ after a pipeline leak in the Gulf of Mexico...
_Underwater pipeline leak sparks fire in Gulf of Mexico_
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/climate-action-now/?refcode=em20210709-2269-P&source=em20210709-2269-P&t=2&akid=2269%2E2526796%2EjNMFCB)
Heatwaves spreading across the country that resulted in melting power cables...
_Portland streetcar service suspended amid heat wave due to melting cables_
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/climate-action-now/?refcode=em20210709-2269-P&source=em20210709-2269-P&t=3&akid=2269%2E2526796%2EjNMFCB)
Our subways and highways in New York City flooding...
_Heavy Rains Pound New York City, Flooding Subway Stations and Roads_
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/climate-action-now/?refcode=em20210709-2269-P&source=em20210709-2269-P&t=4&akid=2269%2E2526796%2EjNMFCB)
And yet, we have legislators suggesting that the climate crisis and infrastructure are not connected.
We have public officials who suggest that combating climate change is too expensive.
We have members of Congress holding weekly check-in calls with Exxon lobbyists.
Meanwhile, Congress is currently negotiating a bipartisan infrastructure plan that does not match the scale of this crisis.
We can’t afford to wait for a “bipartisan” solution. Democrats must use the full weight of their majority to take urgent action before it’s too late.
**As conversations on the infrastructure plan and a reconciliation bill continue, we need you to make your voice heard and help mount up the pressure to take meaningful action on the climate crisis.** [Add your name if you agree: Bold climate legislation MUST be prioritized in order to have a deal.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/climate-action-now/?refcode=em20210709-2269-P&source=em20210709-2269-P&t=5&akid=2269%2E2526796%2EjNMFCB)
**[Add your name](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/climate-action-now/?refcode=em20210709-2269-P&source=em20210709-2269-P&t=6&akid=2269%2E2526796%2EjNMFCB)**
Thanks for taking action today,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210709-2269-P&t=7&refcode2=2269_2526796_jNMFCB&akid=2269%2E2526796%2EjNMFCB)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=2269%2E2526796%2EjNMFCB) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=2269%2E2526796%2EjNMFCB) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=2269%2E2526796%2EjNMFCB)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=2269%2E2526796%2EjNMFCB)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=2269%2E2526796%2EjNMFCB)

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: 🚩TWITTER SUPPRESSION
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
How did ‘Big Tech’ welcome me to the political arena? Twitter to censor a picture I posted on July 4th of me saluting the American flag in my uniform | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f0f1ab7770844c27871b7328e3f38439&_e=APGxqbkjaINKaRRwyFGuwaM-1rIvfnlPzlT5Nvo6p0c-JcanZK77f1uKQ1RjlfWInyXzS5SskIF4g7OxrvKoS54sKQ9XhLN0FVXmJ4B_EYx7H-_D0WlJq1FXdysEBE6Qa-X2ahob-bGZJ5ui_TIZlL_OO1vEzYqKHzM_vheWSbkHj0nAJYXalLdum2eM5wsjLnsTy6Gos7VrnvKG0rRjj6uV1GW3DfsjrGtEMj3vVcbSrxK9JQFu8s3dx8ihj8PrNT9KxpmL-0Z1cbuHQCDtcIyZZ7XW7Y405uUKFXWBddRH28Y5Afddog8KRIM5d7Y3ceIKWGxJj6PnvYOCTJXuHd-KPgidavJUZWMd_HdGoOb8uV7fZRSM6IHJtmnDZ7kyHfGS5XHyJVf3-sFPQpgsuwNoNh5PP4NJiSFmP2GJOtO4QTSpJWhmNw-MPsDQzgHFZMbasDdreWQ2elo5CbMoHdpNBNQQOySWCe0lnxwdbyXv9zyEpBMk3xfU_hszfXUP)

---
Fellow conservative,

My campaign kick-off plan was focused on my career as an Army Officer serving our nation in Operation Enduring Freedom and how my service was tragically cut short when I was severely wounded and nearly killed by a roadside IED.

I wanted to talk about that even through years of painful and arduous recovery, I still found faith and hope in Jesus and my devoted family.

And finally, I wanted to finish by saying that a life of service in the Army and as a businessowner who provides support-services for wounded Veterans has prepared me to be a U.S. Senator.

Fellow conservative, my campaign is ONLY TWO DAYS OLD. Two days.

And how did 'Big Tech' welcome me to the political arena? Twitter censored a picture I posted on July 4th of me saluting the American flag in my uniform by labeling it "**sensitive content**."

[**Hey Twitter, was it my scars or the fact that I salute the flag?
Regardless, neither are going away - and neither am I.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f0f1ab7770844c27871b7328e3f38439&_e=APGxqbkjaINKaRRwyFGuwaM-1rIvfnlPzlT5Nvo6p0c-JcanZK77f1uKQ1RjlfWInyXzS5SskIF4g7OxrvKoS54sKQ9XhLN0FVXmJ4B_EYx7H-_D0WlJq1FXdysEBE6Qa-X2ahob-bGZJ5ui_TIZlL_OO1vEzYqKHzM_vheWSbkHj0nAJYXalLdum2eM5wsjLnsTy6Gos7VrnvKG0rRjj6uV1GW3DfsjrGtEMj3vVcbSrxK9JQFu8s3dx8ihj8PrNT9KxpmL-0Z1cbuHQCDtcIyZZ7XW7Y405uUKFXWBddSRWv0xThHelK4y7lof19BnC2-5_5R7snvTtNHEuLfo9RM176yQbOwLfVefd9TSjHPmkHpHtq_mQWRKyq1SdgELsKBfoW1eZjiPfI-SUQOGRchp2hAUjnF52AvVCmWujOMVOrxmPOZnMoKLRBY59pjIBJOWK3eq3XItlSRncU4e9X-idgwQ5mNpmU70LkWcd678BwXunyyLWZSxArhU3IwH) [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f0f1ab7770844c27871b7328e3f38439&_e=APGxqbkjaINKaRRwyFGuwaM-1rIvfnlPzlT5Nvo6p0c-JcanZK77f1uKQ1RjlfWInyXzS5SskIF4g7OxrvKoS54sKQ9XhLN0FVXmJ4B_EYx7H-_D0WlJq1FXdysEBE6Qa-X2ahob-bGZJ5ui_TIZlL_OO1vEzYqKHzM_vheWSbkHj0nAJYXalLdum2eM5wsjLnsTy6Gos7VrnvKG0rRjj6uV1GW3DfsjrGtEMj3vVcbSrxK9JQFu8s3dx8ihj8PrNT9KxpmL-0Z1cbuHQCDtcIyZZ7XW7Y405uUKFXWBddSPuPJKee8e2M0x5YH61Vx-KcBhg-nj0KUZHudDXXq4QLWebzmenYVoSXqgM36zwsZEU_Dt5UVgIZEeQBVRs-U_fjT6av2JAEp-lf9qke6c_iW9RmbFqEulS2648Ng3OTtqSBYh-WOkGMHsucS6KgaIBBKjwQujzbQIxoHidrzVTHxfw9MifygzliNWQWs_ITsqSTpNFS7JBAQgINYIscd1)
As the Republican candidate, we’re in position to flip Nevada and take back the Senate Majority. But now we’re facing an uphill battle, __**and it’s only going to get worse from here.**__

[**That’s why I’m asking grassroots Conservatives like you to stand with me by making a small contribution**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f0f1ab7770844c27871b7328e3f38439&_e=APGxqbkjaINKaRRwyFGuwaM-1rIvfnlPzlT5Nvo6p0c-JcanZK77f1uKQ1RjlfWInyXzS5SskIF4g7OxrvKoS54sKQ9XhLN0FVXmJ4B_EYx7H-_D0WlJq1FXdysEBE6Qa-X2ahob-bGZJ5ui_TIZlL_OO1vEzYqKHzM_vheWSbkHj0nAJYXalLdum2eM5wsjLnsTy6Gos7VrnvKG0rRjj6uV1GW3DfsjrGtEMj3vVcbSrxK9JQFu8s3dx8ihj8PrNT9KxpmL-0Z1cbuHQCDtcIyZZ7XW7Y405uUKFXWBddQEHF3OD16aQQda8YFH7BpJBxPus9A0kdPibhwD4bsFUzhR2TgKD2bDPe2MmAvIZ9TbY6SydPvppm1pctyp_J4TWtCvbDNaPAG85CxN9Caj_bJPONK0GAYKy6Uo4ko1b9TDQCtLJsAEyQsxmEmS2whrwlosPLgb4k3Pr4A1sxqN0707RY_CvJhGKfwgXLslqbcC0CBTAy6CH5D8BCy6fo9Y), so we can circumvent the Big Tech censors and reach every voter we need to take back our Senate Majority.

| [I stand with Captain Sam Brown](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f0f1ab7770844c27871b7328e3f38439&_e=APGxqbkjaINKaRRwyFGuwaM-1rIvfnlPzlT5Nvo6p0c-JcanZK77f1uKQ1RjlfWInyXzS5SskIF4g7OxrvKoS54sKQ9XhLN0FVXmJ4B_EYx7H-_D0WlJq1FXdysEBE6Qa-X2ahob-bGZJ5ui_TIZlL_OO1vEzYqKHzM_vheWSbkHj0nAJYXalLdum2eM5wsjLnsTy6Gos7VrnvKG0rRjj6uV1GW3DfsjrGtEMj3vVcbSrxK9JQFu8s3dx8ihj8PrNT9KxpmL-0Z1cbuHQCDtcIyZZ7XW7Y405uUKFXWBddRcmbzECcdKtSra-FMYyP_kGKxHKMZtT7KNRzEw3Bl5QBqAjQAIgLzyXK-Tdry-jpqKkeM-HXt5qlFZA2vOn2ifVWwe1s4ZHvguusSy3XqvZuhQn5oaYptB9XmCC8uyzb6TuxvhyK_jTPMxPCknagY6FvbljiFfPTI-lAkry--QpdhewrLQ9g5NdaD_Xmr19TTk9mJMkiy2yRBUKeCMEQWR)
---

And once in office, I’ll take the lead to ensure no Veteran or political candidate who wants to serve their Country is censored by Big Tech monopolies.

I’m infuriated that it’s come to this. But this has only re-affirmed my decision to run for Senate and hold the Big Tech cartel accountable. **If we win this seat, we’ll take back the Senate Majority and I'll work to finally make Silicon Valley accountable to the People.**

[**But I’m counting on your support to make sure we have the tools we need to officially launch our campaign and flip the Senate RED.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f0f1ab7770844c27871b7328e3f38439&_e=APGxqbkjaINKaRRwyFGuwaM-1rIvfnlPzlT5Nvo6p0c-JcanZK77f1uKQ1RjlfWInyXzS5SskIF4g7OxrvKoS54sKQ9XhLN0FVXmJ4B_EYx7H-_D0WlJq1FXdysEBE6Qa-X2ahob-bGZJ5ui_TIZlL_OO1vEzYqKHzM_vheWSbkHj0nAJYXalLdum2eM5wsjLnsTy6Gos7VrnvKG0rRjj6uV1GW3DfsjrGtEMj3vVcbSrxK9JQFu8s3dx8ihj8PrNT9KxpmL-0Z1cbuHQCDtcIyZZ7XW7Y405uUKFXWBddQjQhSHyv2mDZhOTBXi7CoUmJyliw1krDqqdMwcS4TAeEYR1vQA4-0BHux47XoVZM7urkdXqqAhFXPprYNsnjuD1ml4JZCmMzA4uF_gTTkJHliH5z-Dy5qF6xDd5UalAYBkJ6gLi6Cqo9tis--i1iwLVdOrO3jWK8S9VVA9TqK_lCvfmIR8ssUDaLq7ko03xxRnYDW82rdW9SKP-fVL6-xP)

[I stand with Captain Sam Brown](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f0f1ab7770844c27871b7328e3f38439&_e=APGxqbkjaINKaRRwyFGuwaM-1rIvfnlPzlT5Nvo6p0c-JcanZK77f1uKQ1RjlfWInyXzS5SskIF4g7OxrvKoS54sKQ9XhLN0FVXmJ4B_EYx7H-_D0WlJq1FXdysEBE6Qa-X2ahob-bGZJ5ui_TIZlL_OO1vEzYqKHzM_vheWSbkHj0nAJYXalLdum2eM5wsjLnsTy6Gos7VrnvKG0rRjj6uV1GW3DfsjrGtEMj3vVcbSrxK9JQFu8s3dx8ihj8PrNT9KxpmL-0Z1cbuHQCDtcIyZZ7XW7Y405uUKFXWBddRUFf0XVCA7BSAkxArh5wswUxjGIKoDpbbc-gKKETJDi2mxCLqeulZG8YcM3GTY2uY47fVNL9Kp6tjD5Snfc34uwvrJXHSjYdzeeM5UjWjU6BkSOjdRuIAwA2d9lHcV5j-Pbco2Cejd4os2-OkTEPLjlZHM0-fbTTcYKnGRByDt3zsp2gfC4GGDAYpU5LB9C1pPgoJeXEbcwGKGTo04eRwe)
---

_**I’ve faced down terrorists and Islamic fundamentalists.
A fight with Big Tech elites doesn’t scare me.**_
[**Will you join our fight?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f0f1ab7770844c27871b7328e3f38439&_e=APGxqbkjaINKaRRwyFGuwaM-1rIvfnlPzlT5Nvo6p0c-JcanZK77f1uKQ1RjlfWInyXzS5SskIF4g7OxrvKoS54sKQ9XhLN0FVXmJ4B_EYx7H-_D0WlJq1FXdysEBE6Qa-X2ahob-bGZJ5ui_TIZlL_OO1vEzYqKHzM_vheWSbkHj0nAJYXalLdum2eM5wsjLnsTy6Gos7VrnvKG0rRjj6uV1GW3DfsjrGtEMj3vVcbSrxK9JQFu8s3dx8ihj8PrNT9KxpmL-0Z1cbuHQCDtcIyZZ7XW7Y405uUKFXWBddQmtZV3XuP_wVI3YY2hHagbG5GLlEiUnGXjywAKyfM0VRA6J57KXcKnpD2kr8PkmmwVYC-BzFW2Oa_X9VUtIXUsRXlP5YVbzg8FzpvP29fCReEqR_QcDlx_H5XhOVYl1erI9oc8ahc47pTK_LNJYd6WMrXUXqWs5xP4TwOSqf9AOoDNxi33tBKhPYVWbi4INLownzmXpS0sSUPi15svGPzu)

In liberty,

Capt. Sam Brown

Send my Contribution ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f0f1ab7770844c27871b7328e3f38439&_e=APGxqbkjaINKaRRwyFGuwaM-1rIvfnlPzlT5Nvo6p0c-JcanZK77f1uKQ1RjlfWInyXzS5SskIF4g7OxrvKoS54sKQ9XhLN0FVXmJ4B_EYx7H-_D0WlJq1FXdysEBE6Qa-X2ahob-bGZJ5ui_TIZlL_OO1vEzYqKHzM_vheWSbkHj0nAJYXalLdum2eM5wsjLnsTy6Gos7VrnvKG0rRjj6uV1GW3DfsjrGtEMj3vVcbSrxK9JQFu8s3dx8ihj8PrNT9KxpmL-0Z1cbuHQCDtcIyZZ7XW7Y405uUKFXWBddQ_8MSsFhlBLQPQjwPhx7kmwu6cwsWX4FzpJ_-lf0NhaX0lmuvpc2dEddr9AB3L3IFSvxMpFTKGaVv7RW-6NISTtbo7A9UmtMeSjzQ12k8889lz6YgEbgHZoH0p65ajwT7RoiAPpqij4SKcxjzGhaTM4x7Cq4cyYWnt73z3tFZtlbe1I5EVijYpAOg8tAU0d9U_mjhmv_ylPCu22x79ohPg)

_Congratulations, Peter, you 're one of them!_

[**To join, all you have to do is chip in $17.76 to help freedom loving patriots across the nation fight back against the Left 's attacks.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57906430:62wfvJlYN:m:1:3253819041:6DBBC20389EC9FAF0D06D253456E5E0F:r)

_**But now those freedoms are under attack. And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

America's Founders fought for our independence from big government. Now you've got the chance to do the same. [**Chip in $17.76 ASAP!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57906430:62wfvJlYN:m:1:3253819041:6DBBC20389EC9FAF0D06D253456E5E0F:r)

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, While many folks had a short week thanks to celebrating our nation’s independence last weekend, Jane continued to crisscross the state delivering her America First message. From marching in Fourth of July parades, to listening to parents’ concerns about their children’s education, Jane continues to speak directly to voters about the issues they care most about. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **We Must Get Back to America First** Yesterday, Jane joined Boris Epshteyn on [America First with Sebastian Gorka](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=bf79411a30044ee7b589d38d8bdcb660&_e=9F5bX6rypH3OiubzSaMF6BYtiflvh9HaI2pnqXHtTAATCZFQipdDpMJsOoGXTGKjLMUq6mlsXbuzXlQOt7gfMh9BMDk5_qwWjedrZtROIT-iowzGVnnhul_XBhLvlP1zzcBP_ANShs8AEPGZYGggHYEaYjVOxHzrMJaSW1gGvFUQKzHDa8evba2BMYfGZbhU-FgDEDRDt_jI1PghTpO-nvm9nOGqWNUMsdTzr3j1g57EtUm4wirC98BfzyjTgJ8gy5LBPasMVuen3rdHrRQ9gB1ovzx1Qw_pa4-Pyn-LESNpKI90zeMapAAdGpQegm-2l64KLQun6haZnI5Nkp3MrcAYdvl8kXOmYiaTifpDUaw%3D) to talk about the U.S. Senate race and the need to return to America First policies. As someone who fought fiercely over the last 4+ years to champion the America First agenda, Jane will continue that fight in the U.S. Senate to get this country working for Ohio workers and families again. [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=bf79411a30044ee7b589d38d8bdcb660&_e=9F5bX6rypH3OiubzSaMF6DyIRvOEXY8uODANMuF68H2CJAiN6dx7lBIqe2VJGP-WzxbCNUcyNq_HXw9QfcpDoohilKVVuSryYK5GjUnz7_uPmVFlHuOFB8VzVrWTiACbybqbt-rsvLc3jVuARou09gwWotT_LObKezAuwp9uLWljoPtktUiDi9HNXJTz5ZOXOObYBqAo-OEU7AGvHhYyNW3GzO291jH-A9HLQuZkZA1cmmU75HzeHzTGeV96Z8z-jX91tyhORZHPu4QleWMEx9eXS8DLJMfsY1tRELvRLfdcNM9xOloMbDkET5W96BtHmAnDPzxriDYYNS__Yrhu5F0ecB0FDurgoli1JwYWr-dElwMym6rxQBVG6yJ7cvhJ) **From the Trail** On Saturday, Jane traveled to Hilliard for their Independence Day Parade. After a year of missing out on gatherings like this, it was great to see so many patriotic Ohioans in Hilliard! Later that day, Jane and the team marched in the Lebanon Declaration of Independence Parade. Another great event! On Thursday, Jane joined a group of concerned parents in Fairview Park as part of Jane’s statewide listening tour on education and Critical Race Theory. **Latest Endorsements** The campaign continued to garner endorsements from grassroots conservatives across Ohio who have coalesced around Jane as the clear choice for U.S. Senate. “As one of Ohio’s previous 'mothers of the year,' I cannot express how important it is to me to see strong candidates running for higher office who are committed to protecting our children. There is no one better suited to run for the U.S Senate than Jane Timken. She is a fighter and will fiercely defend and protect Ohio’s children and families. She has my full endorsement.” - **Brook Harless, Plain Township Trustee** ** ** Full List of Endorsements: Tim Ross, Coshocton County GOP Secretary Aaron Maus, Clermont County Central Committee Vice-Chair Alexis Lewis, Erie County GOP Secretary Brook Harless, Plain Township Trustee, Stark County Jeff Chattin, Pike County Commissioner **The Left's Hypocrisy on Election Integrity** This week, the Lima News featured an op-ed from Jane regarding election integrity and the complete hypocrisy from the left and the mainstream media. "In 2016 and beyond, Hillary Clinton said the “[election could be stolen from clean_body: Jane Timken for Ohio Update https:// Dear Peter, While many folks had a short week thanks to celebrating our nation’s independence last weekend, Jane continued to crisscross the state delivering her America First message. From marching in Fourth of July parades, to listening to parents’ concerns about their children’s education, Jane continues to speak directly to voters about the issues they care most about. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. We Must Get Back to America First Yesterday, Jane joined Boris Epshteyn on to talk about the U.S. Senate race and the need to return to America First policies. As someone who fought fiercely over the last 4+ years to champion the America First agenda, Jane will continue that fight in the U.S. Senate to get this country working for Ohio workers and families again. From the Trail On Saturday, Jane traveled to Hilliard for their Independence Day Parade. After a year of missing out on gatherings like this, it was great to see so many patriotic Ohioans in Hilliard! Later that day, Jane and the team marched in the Lebanon Declaration of Independence Parade. Another great event! On Thursday, Jane joined a group of concerned parents in Fairview Park as part of Jane’s statewide listening tour on education and Critical Race Theory. Latest Endorsements The campaign continued to garner endorsements from grassroots conservatives across Ohio who have coalesced around Jane as the clear choice for U.S. Senate. “As one of Ohio’s previous 'mothers of the year,' I cannot express how important it is to me to see strong candidates running for higher office who are committed to protecting our children. There is no one better suited to run for the U.S Senate than Jane Timken. She is a fighter and will fiercely defend and protect Ohio’s children and families. She has my full endorsement.” - Brook Harless, Plain Township Trustee Full List of Endorsements: Tim Ross, Coshocton County GOP Secretary Aaron Maus, Clermont County Central Committee Vice-Chair Alexis Lewis, Erie County GOP Secretary Brook Harless, Plain Township Trustee, Stark County Jeff Chattin, Pike County Commissioner The Left's Hypocrisy on Election Integrity This week, the Lima News featured an op-ed from Jane regarding election integrity and the complete hypocrisy from the left and the mainstream media. "In 2016 and beyond, Hillary Clinton said the “,” that “” and that President Trump was an “.” Democrats repeated the now-debunked Russia-collusion narrative ad nauseam. Even two years after the election, believed that “Russia tampered with vote tallies in order to get Donald Trump elected president.” Despite these repeated claims and untruths about our elections, there were not constant stories from the mainstream media about “,” no public lashings as to how one party is now a “” to democracy. Yet in today’s world, Americans are not able to bring up concerns about the 2020 election or talk about any election integrity measure without being scorned and labeled. Take last week’s Supreme Court decision on Brnovich v. DNC. The court two common-sense voting laws in Arizona that prohibited the third-party collection of ballots — a practice known as ballot harvesting — and said that ballots must be returned to the correct precinct.” Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | | ---|---

clean_body: | | | | This is a new low for her! Friend, Did you hear what Lisa Murkowski said? In a recent interview, Murkowski continued to blast President Trump! She even went as far to come after me personally! It’s clear Murkowski is worried, and she should be. A recent poll has our campaign BEATING her by 20 points and the momentum is on our side. It comes as no surprise that Murkowski has a personal vendetta against President Trump. First, she blocked his America First agenda every way she could in the Senate. Then, she voted against judicial nominees like Brett Kavanaugh and even supported Impeachment. Now, she’s coming after grassroots Conservatives like YOU. You would think this behavior comes from the Radical Left, not those who pretend to be on our side. This is a new low for her! Thankfully, we have a huge opportunity to end the 40 year Murkowski dynasty! Instead of fighting for Alaskans and Conservative policies, she’s continued her attacks on President Trump! This is the same Murkowski who has cozied up to the DC Insiders and Special Interests who are bankrolling her campaign. I won’t stand for it. I won’t apologize for being an America First Conservative and that is how I will lead in the US Senate. I am proud to be ENDORSED by President Trump. He knows that I will continue to stand up for the Unborn and fight for our 2nd Amendment rights. For Alaska, Kelly P.S. -- Team Kelly needs Conservatives like you to join the fight! kellyforak.com | | | | ==

| **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Dear ****Derek,**

**For those who missed it, last night the NHGOP and Gilford Republican Committee collaborated in a dinner to host Congressman Dan Crenshaw, and it was a sold out success! Thank you to all who purchased tickets to attend the event, especially to John Motta and Dan Richards, who donated an entire table EACH to provide free tickets to local veterans. Support towards these events provide our party with the means to operate and ensure resources to Republican candidates throughout the state. Unlike NH Democrats who primarily receive large, out-of-state donations, the New Hampshire Republican Party relies on our fundraisers and small in-state donor donations. Every little bit helps, and it’s truly up to every one of us to try and do our part.

As Governor Sununu said last night, we need to do everything we can to promote our solid Republican budget. This means submitting LTEs, posting to social media, and telling your friends and family about the transformational state budget Republicans just passed. We at the NHGOP are here to help! Make sure you follow us on Twitter and Facebook for our latest insights, and feel free to reach out to Joe or Maya for help in crafting your own LTEs about the budget. Together we’ll fight back against the millions in out-of-state special interest dollars seeking to spread mistruths about the Republican budget.

Additionally, I have my own Twitter account now that we’ll use to share information about the New Hampshire Republican Party - please “join” me on Twitter by following me at @NHGOPChairman!

That being said, we have a TON of fun opportunities for folks to get active in the coming weeks, so be sure to keep checking our **[**NHGOP calendar**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fevents.nh.gop%2Fcalendar%2F/1/0100017a8d200654-5c0facdc-4068-45d6-8a64-4cbf2a762795-000000/x43H9qubtnMxBrnyOjBXNI4VEpU=226)**, because tickets are selling out FAST. Our most recent dinner with Dan Crenshaw sold out almost a week before the event date, so don't wait! **

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

clean_body: Keep up with NHGOP happenings! | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | Weekly Newsletter ** Note from Chairman Stepanek Weekly Governor's Glance **Upcoming Events House Republican Update Senate Republican Update Republican Spotlight Noteworthy News NHGOP Tweets NH Federation of Republican WomenNH Young RepublicansNH Federation of College Republicans | | Dear Derek, For those who missed it, last night the NHGOP and Gilford Republican Committee collaborated in a dinner to host Congressman Dan Crenshaw, and it was a sold out success! Thank you to all who purchased tickets to attend the event, especially to John Motta and Dan Richards, who donated an entire table EACH to provide free tickets to local veterans. Support towards these events provide our party with the means to operate and ensure resources to Republican candidates throughout the state. Unlike NH Democrats who primarily receive large, out-of-state donations, the New Hampshire Republican Party relies on our fundraisers and small in-state donor donations. Every little bit helps, and it’s truly up to every one of us to try and do our part. As Governor Sununu said last night, we need to do everything we can to promote our solid Republican budget. This means submitting LTEs, posting to social media, and telling your friends and family about the transformational state budget Republicans just passed. We at the NHGOP are here to help! Make sure you follow us on Twitter and Facebook for our latest insights, and feel free to reach out to Joe or Maya for help in crafting your own LTEs about the budget. Together we’ll fight back against the millions in out-of-state special interest dollars seeking to spread mistruths about the Republican budget. Additionally, I have my own Twitter account now that we’ll use to share information about the New Hampshire Republican Party - please “join” me on Twitter by following me at @NHGOPChairman! That being said, we have a TON of fun opportunities for folks to get active in the coming weeks, so be sure to keep checking our , because tickets are selling out FAST. name: Nikki Fried
subject: Reaching out to you before the weekend
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

I wanted to touch base with a brief note of gratitude before the weekend.

As Stefanie told us the other day, contributions of $100 or less made up 92% of our June total. I’m more hopeful than ever thanks to grassroots supporters like you.

Before you sign off for the weekend, I wanted to ask for your help once more. National Republican donors are bankrolling DeSantis’ campaign as he prepares to run for President in 2024. We need your help to keep building our grassroots movement to defeat him next year and break Florida’s system.

If you’re able to chip in before the weekend, you’ll help us keep pace with DeSantis and build on our momentum from June. Please click here to donate what you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ejunefrnumbersnf?refcode=friday]

Thanks,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

subject: Was it my scars or the American flag?

body:
How did ‘Big Tech’ welcome me to the political arena? Twitter to censor a picture I posted on July 4th of me saluting the American flag in my uniform | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=81645fcade8140c69c81106b7cf16b02&_e=A52Mb7gmkYrYTRI6wMJsCMDO-M8ExbazgOadmscm4TkTc31wJ0T4OaFBqRPXEPVWi4JVhFqwpmxJIzVWqeRRY0HWb2-60bFNamTXLyMIp-Gf3FEW_WP5WxqaFrRQswmn1VGz_GZn-xiBPtMo5xslJUfNU6v8FvFqUL1p26YIbH9Q_G-ifowHaZXPFquYKOCo0AqBrXcOaWAICCoKP2iTOw8zGfotbZw5QfDo3sY7hIOi9iUC4H--z0F0VCg9uJpJJaB8yu3C5OyszVEjJACBV1DvBpVlpKQBCkXRMVS821_gAPlFAgbVvti1JNvu6LP7BaLoTiPSOwAXtx3V5TTlfO7rQ_he4iXbXjCRay6Wln_gBVi4fbzpgj2FREqLU1rJ7GG_k6ua3SVflflJEAfKxKbsOqlL_XCfxUCHiM9J3xE4fmrquEFleqj7y1eCElkqp1P2LWHKgXHDvvrJVp-zr0IPcrG1AgcJmq4Vk6JHIIk%3D)

---
Fellow conservative,

My campaign kick-off plan was focused on my career as an Army Officer serving our nation in Operation Enduring Freedom and how my service was tragically cut short when I was severely wounded and nearly killed by a roadside IED.

I wanted to talk about that even through years of painful and arduous recovery, I still found faith and hope in Jesus and my devoted family.

And finally, I wanted to finish by saying that a life of service in the Army and as a businessowner who provides support-services for wounded Veterans has prepared me to be a U.S. Senator.

Fellow conservative, my campaign is ONLY TWO DAYS OLD. Two days.

And how did 'Big Tech' welcome me to the political arena? Twitter censored a picture I posted on July 4th of me saluting the American flag in my uniform by labeling it "**sensitive content**."

[**Hey Twitter, was it my scars or the fact that I salute the flag?
Regardless, neither are going away - and neither am I.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=81645fcade8140c69c81106b7cf16b02&_e=A52Mb7gmkYrYTRI6wMJsCMDO-M8ExbazgOadmscm4TkTc31wJ0T4OaFBqRPXEPVWi4JVhFqwpmxJIzVWqeRRY0HWb2-60bFNamTXLyMIp-Gf3FEW_WP5WxqaFrRQswmn1VGz_GZn-xiBPtMo5xslJUfNU6v8FvFqUL1p26YIbH9Q_G-ifowHaZXPFquYKOCo0AqBrXcOaWAICCoKP2iTOw8zGfotbZw5QfDo3sY7hIOi9iUC4H--z0F0VCg9uJpJJaB8yu3C5OyszVEjJACBVzhGsKvQ5zSZ5AhwaEputdd_120LtLhYsMs7CfI-hG-m3H69jvAMj9mU-GrFMqQe96TzIahULPuv6DVqOXVYLHKfut76wjE4qbbbORFlrmDPv8nuyNYY7Y1IBuepyUGK-dsU-nzduSh8_LpwcrtTCd2cimo10R5qHK-RPqzGspQzpyNrRjf5dQ3jjD_xncleAXffXFzye3Z1xuvvIgq_W1s%3D) [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=81645fcade8140c69c81106b7cf16b02&_e=A52Mb7gmkYrYTRI6wMJsCMDO-M8ExbazgOadmscm4TkTc31wJ0T4OaFBqRPXEPVWi4JVhFqwpmxJIzVWqeRRY0HWb2-60bFNamTXLyMIp-Gf3FEW_WP5WxqaFrRQswmn1VGz_GZn-xiBPtMo5xslJUfNU6v8FvFqUL1p26YIbH9Q_G-ifowHaZXPFquYKOCo0AqBrXcOaWAICCoKP2iTOw8zGfotbZw5QfDo3sY7hIOi9iUC4H--z0F0VCg9uJpJJaB8yu3C5OyszVEjJACBVzSfl8GlOCF1y_d9DXHCFUKv4QEilu8AZ8R9hiqAzZHajW-1rOIQnvTf4xYXw_F8nzOmxQIfXBFxqA672YgGTIaMgUThcWZwYEPKQVoKqpwfLL-cG3Vp6JpkA-j0dFHhcHPCRyKEK8tw1sDpreGq1eZeS0TDp2PimUhOLOBepiqjT8PahFllQEaQdYcx4OYeQEY9RNCTFxKhA8cmy7QZ0FU%3D)

[**That’s why I’m asking grassroots Conservatives like you to stand with me by making a small contribution**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=81645fcade8140c69c81106b7cf16b02&_e=A52Mb7gmkYrYTRI6wMJsCMDO-M8ExbazgOadmscm4TkTc31wJ0T4OaFBqRPXEPVWi4JVhFqwpmxJIzVWqeRRY0HWb2-60bFNamTXLyMIp-Gf3FEW_WP5WxqaFrRQswmn1VGz_GZn-xiBPtMo5xslJUfNU6v8FvFqUL1p26YIbH9Q_G-ifowHaZXPFquYKOCo0AqBrXcOaWAICCoKP2iTOw8zGfotbZw5QfDo3sY7hIOi9iUC4H--z0F0VCg9uJpJJaB8yu3C5OyszVEjJACBV7oRgt3xAkfaHeuveEEsl370aWhmbuTjgNHnuAxqp4cSlQKoZX_4Mrf_NUE5uYWcGblELGyIq4B05_tTMypEc40fhGzSYJ0bsGtzu371hjHCnRph9gvcwaaet25QHJlZKFEygsR1IYKRhWs5ossU895zcp1iUOvmsiDSXSbDq_4CxHb7WeLKqeQauUqNhRuxZqV3JLEUJMp4kzFScW1-3Qg%3D), so we can circumvent the Big Tech censors and reach every voter we need to take back our Senate Majority.

| [I stand with Captain Sam Brown](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=81645fcade8140c69c81106b7cf16b02&_e=A52Mb7gmkYrYTRI6wMJsCMDO-M8ExbazgOadmscm4TkTc31wJ0T4OaFBqRPXEPVWi4JVhFqwpmxJIzVWqeRRY0HWb2-60bFNamTXLyMIp-Gf3FEW_WP5WxqaFrRQswmn1VGz_GZn-xiBPtMo5xslJUfNU6v8FvFqUL1p26YIbH9Q_G-ifowHaZXPFquYKOCo0AqBrXcOaWAICCoKP2iTOw8zGfotbZw5QfDo3sY7hIOi9iUC4H--z0F0VCg9uJpJJaB8yu3C5OyszVEjJACBVwJyMHJAYUaLcjCncVg6EJQIyYHq1SaQtTrwz9O4muC7OxdE6p8Wz134ZKT2vCBGC2W_XInxJkkVqF052KI65kuJamwG_JWH_5M3_EioXCffEsRDGu-j3sBW-q1woYtl5XY31P01aofeqPpOBl4AIBd-uYXSx0JEmuwceByd4l7Wvds7oA7Kuevro5neTYF0JFx3VWlMSEkrlA34-CrHD2c%3D)

I’m infuriated that it’s come to this. But this has only re-affirmed my decision to run for Senate and hold the Big Tech cartel accountable. **If we win this seat, we’ll take back the Senate Majority and I'll work to finally make Silicon Valley accountable to the People.**

[**But I’m counting on your support to make sure we have the tools we need to officially launch our campaign and flip the Senate RED.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=81645fcade8140c69c81106b7cf16b02&_e=A52Mb7gmkYrYTRI6wMJsCMDO-M8ExbazgOadmscm4TkTc31wJ0T4OaFBqRPXEPVWi4JVhFqwpmxJIzVWqeRRY0HWb2-60bFNamTXLyMIp-Gf3FEW_WP5WxqaFrRQswmn1VGz_GZn-xiBPtMo5xslJUfNU6v8FvFqUL1p26YIbH9Q_G-ifowHaZXPFquYKOCo0AqBrXcOaWAICCoKP2iTOw8zGfotbZw5QfDo3sY7hIOi9iUC4H--z0F0VCg9uJpJJaB8yu3C5OyszVEjJACBV0LXNcxSG8oaZzQuBe5DRm3b26cHcSQD8LljHiheecSordKPcFc7h7BEk6TfbTAPtoQusx_KQSxa9T-Kbwhyq8Vvqp3OkJKdhAv_xDCBtv1c0KruARr5q7Yqo7iQYes2MRQacwy67LptU556y4iffJm-E0U5WGJH14YthWLv0uiB0Co0xTqO-RUCj2HwJUOKvjQQDyig4T5p5UfgKq1EgtM%3D)

body:
| | | **CNN: TRUMP WILL BE CLEAR FRONTRUNNER FOR PRESIDENTIAL NOMINATION**
I'm in complete disbelief.

**FIRST:** Trump threatened to run for president if we lose the House.

**THEN:** CNN just reported Trump is almost certain to win the nomination if he runs.

**[NOW: We need to get to work to HOLD the House and DEFEAT Trump's plan to barge back into power. So I'm calling for 1,OOO gifts before midnight. Please, will you rush $3? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/aRwEBeAXa0F_)** | [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: PENDING

name: Trump Poll (via House GOP)
subject: Are you watching Trump’s speech?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Trump needs to know if he can count on you to tune in. Trump and his allies in Congress are counting on you to show your support.

Peter, Trump is speaking on Sunday and needs all America First patriots on deck to make his speech a success. _That brings us to one very important question:_

**Will you watch Trump's speech on Sunday?**

[**YES**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57905720:Jl3F-JlVN:m:1:3253819041:68969E41A1CBBB4C665D4ACFF022E368:r)

[**NO**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57905721:Jl3F-JlVN:m:1:3253819041:68969E41A1CBBB4C665D4ACFF022E368:r)

Trump needs to know you have his back and, as a Top Trump Patriot, we know you won't let him down. [**This one-click poll will take 10 seconds to complete but will go a long way to giving Trump the support he needs at this critical moment.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57905720:Jl3F-JlVN:m:1:3253819041:68969E41A1CBBB4C665D4ACFF022E368:r)

It's more important than ever to stand with Trump and House Republicans. The Democrats are so blinded by hate they will not stop until they undo Trump's pro-job America First legacy in its entirety.

_Biden wants to put America LAST and will undermine all of Trump 's conservative achievements from the last four years._

[**It 's a simple yes or no question, Peter: Will you watch Trump's speech on Sunday? **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57905720:Jl3F-JlVN:m:1:3253819041:68969E41A1CBBB4C665D4ACFF022E368:r)

[**YES**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57905722:Jl3F-JlVN:m:1:3253819041:68969E41A1CBBB4C665D4ACFF022E368:r)

[**NO**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57905723:Jl3F-JlVN:m:1:3253819041:68969E41A1CBBB4C665D4ACFF022E368:r)

Trump needs to know if he can count on you to tune in. As we said, Trump and his allies in Congress are counting on you to show your support.

The media, Democrats, pollsters, and pundits will be paying VERY close attention. We need to have a HUGE audience to prove to them Trump and House conservatives are stronger than ever.

[**So, Peter, are you planning on watching?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57905720:Jl3F-JlVN:m:1:3253819041:68969E41A1CBBB4C665D4ACFF022E368:r)

Thank you,

House Republicans

clean_body: Without your support, public radio could disappear | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Given this horrible development, we need to confirm Cresco listenership TODAY so public radio stations like NPR aren’t SHUT DOWN: | | | | | Look, this is horrifying -- if this trend continues, public radio could disappear. And without Cresco listeners like you, stations like NPR won’t stand a chance against National Republican attacks... | | | Thanks for participating today!! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Culp for Congress
subject: URGENT: Don't knock on my door.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BzuFK8&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EB8UFc3&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/d120dd04-9632-4305-9889-2e75d0d9f15d.png]

Health and Human Services Secretary Becerra from Biden's Administration says the government has "every right" to know whether you've been vaccinated or not.

Later today, you'll receive our regularly scheduled email, but this information hit our office and I needed to make you aware of it immediately.

If you haven't heard, I'd encourage you to listen to the interview that Secretary Becerra gave on CNN [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SWFI0H&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EwCWhUp&]explaining to the newscaster that the government does have the right to conduct this door-to-door campaign and implied that the government does have a right to know your COVID-19 vaccination status.

Secretary Becerra also said in his interview, "we want to give people the sense that they have the freedom to choose.”Biden, you and your administration don’t have to “give us the sense that we can choose”, we have that right and it’s constitutionally protected. I don't think Biden or his administration understands that Americans like their privacy, so don't come knocking on my door.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/8e494f95-c171-4269-a55e-f9989e59fe10.jpg]

Don't underestimate the left!

The left isn't stupid, they know the laws of our exceptional country. They clearly are using a fear tactic in order to control and scare us into forgetting our rights. But unlike Biden, I know that Americans do know their rights, and they know when their rights are being violated.

The 4th amendment clearly states, "The right of the people to be secure in their persons, houses, etc."

As your representative in Congress, I will stand firm on our founding documents and defend you against the tyrannical overreach of Biden, and the betrayal of RINOs like Dan Newhouse who has only aided the radical left in their agendas. There is hope in America if we stand side by side for freedom.

Honored to serve,

Loren

THIS IS IMPORTANT. I CAN DO $100! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SWFIvW&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=Etbmt3s&]

subject: Response Needed: Champion a Green New Deal for Virginia 🌻🌎
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Virginia Justice Democrats
body:
| | | | [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=152d19b634&e=76fc145c69)
---
| | | Team-

As we are campaigning for our candidates here in Virginia, it is vital to champion the issues that we care most about. The Virginia Justice Democrats have joined the coalition once again to champion an authentically Virginian Green New Deal in the 2022 Legislative Session. As the Democratic candidates campaign for the state legislature, we are calling on you to send an email to your current elected officials to let them know what we wish to see to battle climate change in the coming legislative session:
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=34ee8f32c7&e=76fc145c69)
---
|
---
| When the Cuyahoga River caught fire 52 years ago, it spurred the modern environmental movement and led to the creation of the EPA. Last week, the Gulf was on fire, hundreds died in the Pacific Northwest heatwave, and right now, cities are being consumed by flames. There has been a lot of talk about Green New Deal. It is not an environmental plan. It is an intersectional plan with the intentionality of lifting up people. We can address both the climate crisis and the inequality crisis with the same set of policies. As the impacts of climate change mount, inequality will continue to grow. We have to shift away from extracting and burning fossil fuels and towards a lower carbon economy. [Although 2022’s language is still being finalized, we need your help NOW to cultivate support by talking to your legislators about Green New Deal Virginia Coalition's legislative priorities.](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=4393667d50&e=76fc145c69)
---
| **Send a letter to your state representatives asking them to support Green New Deal Virginia Coalition legislation in 2022. You can use our sample letter, or personalize it by copying and pasting individual talking points provided below.**
1. After sending your letter, consider scheduling a meeting with your state representatives and let our Outreach and Education and Defossilization Energy Efficiency Renewables Working Group leaders know. We are here to help. Natalie Pien at natcpien1@gmail.com and Stacy Lovelace at johnsonsc3@gmail.com. Don’t know who your representatives are, find out here, [https://whosmy.virginiageneralassembly.gov](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=8221be7761&e=76fc145c69)!
2. Once your meeting is scheduled, invite your friends, your organization’s members, and/or DEER’s Working Group leader, Stacy, so she can see if any member from DEER can join you!
3. Prepare for your meeting with the talking points below and don’t forget to share your personal story about why Green New Deal Virginia Coalition legislation matters to you!

In Solidarity,
Virginia Justice Democrats
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=cec1cd1113&e=76fc145c69 "DONATE NOW")
---
| _Virginia Justice Democrats is independent from the national Justice Democrats. Our focus is on Virginia issues. Although we are in communication we do not take directions or instructions from the national organization. VAJD sets our own state-specific platforms, organizational structure, mission, and candidate vetting process. [Become a sustaining donor for just $5/month. ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=86f08108db&e=76fc145c69)_

| _Paid for and Authorized by Virginia Justice Democrats.

The Virginia Justice Democrats have joined the coalition once again to champion an authentically Virginian Green New Deal in the 2022 Legislative Session. As the Democratic candidates campaign for the state legislature, we are calling on you to send an email to your current elected officials to let them know what we wish to see to battle climate change in the coming legislative session: | | | When the Cuyahoga River caught fire 52 years ago, it spurred the modern environmental movement and led to the creation of the EPA. Last week, the Gulf was on fire, hundreds died in the Pacific Northwest heatwave, and right now, cities are being consumed by flames. There has been a lot of talk about Green New Deal. It is not an environmental plan. It is an intersectional plan with the intentionality of lifting up people. We can address both the climate crisis and the inequality crisis with the same set of policies. As the impacts of climate change mount, inequality will continue to grow. We have to shift away from extracting and burning fossil fuels and towards a lower carbon economy. | Send a letter to your state representatives asking them to support Green New Deal Virginia Coalition legislation in 2022. You can use our sample letter, or personalize it by copying and pasting individual talking points provided below. 1. After sending your letter, consider scheduling a meeting with your state representatives and let our Outreach and Education and Defossilization Energy Efficiency Renewables Working Group leaders know. We are here to help. Natalie Pien at natcpien1@gmail.com and Stacy Lovelace at johnsonsc3@gmail.com. Don’t know who your representatives are, find out here, ! 2. Once your meeting is scheduled, invite your friends, your organization’s members, and/or DEER’s Working Group leader, Stacy, so she can see if any member from DEER can join you! 3. Prepare for your meeting with the talking points below and don’t forget to share your personal story about why Green New Deal Virginia Coalition legislation matters to you! In Solidarity, Virginia Justice Democrats | "DONATE NOW" | Virginia Justice Democrats is independent from the national Justice Democrats. Our focus is on Virginia issues. Although we are in communication we do not take directions or instructions from the national organization. VAJD sets our own state-specific platforms, organizational structure, mission, and candidate vetting process. | Paid for and Authorized by Virginia Justice Democrats. If someone forwarded you this email, up here to get updates from Follow us on social media and visit our website at | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | Our mailing address is: 43607 McDowell Sq Leesburg, VA 20176 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

body:
There's literally no time left to turn things around.
Click here to opt out.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1e1dae853a214fa6bd5eef963472fcf9&_e=N3rZQwEXR90ixXZrC5QtrbIsZwTHxQ2rYAzsvfWCIaY7c0Eig_vNSuxi0kXVZ36y2RhG1PjpB805fHRB5v_MLt_7uRtDSmZ3ntoWSEL9dBrt0IpHZOYalZIFlPGEHnOIgS7PwaBxuAkHl8867m-le5S77Ok16tIs7QkEclVya0p9B-OPm6cmSZ_5ifuxvYIruVEW2rwSJyCZiEVZ-zWVnzooUVAhCTGUJUvhhnmljz3QfuevNhxmQGQq2m1NPEihZwXy0NI6k0z1y3tpHrLmqy0dg3emiFe8UUxDaFeeVZ-4MYXs5jCyIZ2mIWxYd7fCNLnvxVbSb0efp1_RcTKWJ2eTnPJGQaXKB3lJkYzsiNQH8MMEqnTy1N_WUpvQK8595Dk-HaUQryYvswBYG5XzIfsqJLrXICswwFwM6qZgejB7u8u3yZv4KHFfLUR6CKS0gE5ZvFIe7a6P8Jf-iVZoUHqpYKx3uXe05su5h40u2VpMQtzGAr2WTypVIx3bSiXl0S1IlWFiRM_mDAGQke2dzoaZXfQTkGgR83TT2iGjL7k%3D)
Peter -- **WHAT A PUNCH IN THE GUT.**
We thought we'd have a strong week, but our donations are drying up fast with only days before voters head to the polls in the must-win **Texas Special Election Runoff.**

name: Tom Fitton
subject: More Fauci Agency China Docs
body:
Judicial Watch Goes to Court for Marine Hero!

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FBI FOR RECORDS ON ALLEGED TRANSFER OF BANK
FINANCIAL DATA OF EVERY PERSON IN WASHINGTON, DC AREA AROUND JANUARY 6

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25318&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9yWEhTTWVRN1V1RT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDcwOTIzNDczOA==]
The Left, including the Biden administration, seems to be using the
January 6 disturbance as an excuse to target, intimidate and abuse
political opponents. With those concerns in mind, we filed a FOIA
lawsuit against the Department of Justice for records of communication
between the FBI and several financial institutions about the reported
transfer of financial transactions made by people in DC, Maryland and
Virginia on January 5 and January 6, 2021 (_Judicial Watch v. U.S.
Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25276&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWphbi0yMDIxLWJhbmstcmVxdWVzdHMtY29tcGxhaW50LTAxMjE2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDcwOTIzNDczOA==]
(No.
1:21-cv-01216)). Last week, the FBI refused to confirm or deny any
such records exist.

We sued after the FBI failed to respond to a February 10, 2021, FOIA
request for:

All records of communication between the FBI and any financial
institution, including but not limited to Bank of America, Citibank,
Chase Manhattan Bank, Discover, and/or American Express, in which the
FBI sought transaction data for those financial institutions’ debit
and credit card account holders who made purchases in Washington, DC,
Maryland and/or Virginia on January 5, 2021 and/or January 6, 2021.
Bank of America reportedly
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25272&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vb3Bpbmlvbi90dWNrZXItY2FybHNvbi1iYW5rLW9mLWFtZXJpY2EtY3VzdG9tZXItZGF0YS1mZWRzLWNhcGl0b2wtcmlvdD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDcwOTIzNDczOA==]
“actively but secretly engaged in the hunt for extremists in
cooperation with the government” and, following the events of
January 6, gave the FBI financial records of their customers who fit
the following profile:

1. Customers confirmed as transacting, either through bank account
debit card or credit card purchases in Washington, D.C. between 1/5
and 1/6.

2. Purchases made for Hotel/Airbnb RSVPs in DC, VA, and MD after
1/6.

3. Any purchase of weapons or at a weapons-related merchant between
1/7 and their upcoming suspected stay in D.C. area around
Inauguration Day.

4. Airline related purchases since 1/6.
Here’s how the FBI is playing games with our investigation:

On June 8, 2021, the court overseeing the lawsuit ordered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25273&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWphbi0yMDIxLWJhbmstcmVxdWVzdHMtb3JkZXItMDEyMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzA5MjM0NzM4]
the
FBI/DOJ to respond substantively to our request within 30 days.

On June 17, 2021, the FBI responded to our request, stating that the
request was “too broad” and asked for “further clarification
and/or narrowing” of the request.

On June 24, 2021, we responded to this request by sending a news
article
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25274&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFpbHltYWlsLmNvLnVrL25ld3MvYXJ0aWNsZS05MjI4MzY3L0JvQS1zbm9vcGVkLWh1bmRyZWRzLWFjY291bnRzLWxvb2tpbmctQ2FwaXRvbC1yaW90ZXJzLmh0bWw/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MDkyMzQ3Mzg=]
detailing
Bank of America’s handing over transaction records to the FBI of
people in the Washington, DC area around the date of January 6.

On July 1, 2021, the FBI responded to our FOIA request with a letter
stating that it accepts our narrowing of the search, but that it
neither confirms nor denies
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25275&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWJhbmstcmVxdWVzdC1qYW4tNi1nbG9tYXItMDEyMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzA5MjM0NzM4]
the
existence of these documents. The FBI states:

The FBI accepts this supplemental correspondence as evidence you are
further clarifying and narrowing the subject of your request to
records/financial transaction requests from financial institutions
pertaining to the alleged riot on Capitol Hill on January 6, 2021, to
include records/financial transactions from January 5, 2021 for the 3
jurisdictions.

Please be advised that it is the FBI’s policy to neither confirm nor
deny the existence of any records which would disclose the existence
or non-existence of non-public law enforcement techniques, procedures,
and/or guidelines. The acknowledgment that any such records exist or
do not exist could reasonably be expected to risk circumvention of
law.
We want the details on what looks to be an unprecedented abuse of the
financial privacy of countless innocent Americans by big banks and the
FBI. The FBI’s stonewalling and non-denial denial of our request
speak volumes.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES USPS ON TRACKING AMERICANS’ SOCIAL MEDIA POSTS

Did you know that the Post Office has an Internet Covert Operations
Program monitoring your social media posts? That’s right. This
agency, which has lost
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25319&F=T&]
$87 billion over the past 14 years, has time to look into your
opinions, even though it has trouble getting a letter into your
mailbox in a timely way – or at all.

To learn more about spy operation, we filed a Freedom of Information
Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Postal Service (USPS) for
information relating to the tracking and collecting of Americans’
social media posts through its Internet Covert Operations Program
(iCOP) (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Postal Service_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25310&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdXNwcy1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDE3MzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzA5MjM0NzM4]
(No.
1:21-cv-01735)).

We sued after the U.S. Postal Inspection Service (USPIS) failed to
respond to an April 27, 2021, FOIA request seeking access to:

1. All records from January 1, 2020 to the present identifying
criteria for flagging social media posts as “inflammatory” or
otherwise worthy of further scrutiny by other government agencies.

2. All records from January 1, 2020 to the present relating to the
Internet Covert Operations Program’s database of social media posts.

3. All records and communications from January 1, 2020 to the present
between any official of the U.S. Postal Inspection Service and any
official of the Federal Bureau of Investigation and/or the U.S.
Department of Homeland Security regarding the Internet Covert
Operations Program.

4. All social media posts that the Internet Covert Operations Program
has flagged and forwarded to other government agencies.

5. Any analyses outlining the authority of the U.S. Postal Inspection
Service to monitor, track, and collect Americans’ social media
posts.

6. All records concerning the reasons for the U.S. Postal Inspection
Service to monitor, track, and collect Americans’ social media
posts.

7. All records of communication sent to and by Chief Postal Inspector
Gary Barksdale from January 1, 2020 to the present regarding the
Internet Covert Operations Program.
The FOIA request was prompted by an April 21, 2021, _Yahoo!
News_ report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25311&F=T&]
that
the law enforcement arm of the U.S. Postal Service has been “running
a program that tracks and collects Americans’ social media posts,
including those about planned protests.” Again, according to a
document obtained by _Yahoo! News_, this surveillance effort is known
as the Internet Covert Operations Program (iCOP):

“Analysts with the United States Postal Inspection Service (USPIS)
Internet Covert Operations Program (iCOP) monitored significant
activity regarding planned [anti-lockdown] protests occurring
internationally and domestically on March 20, 2021,” says the March
16 government bulletin, marked as “law enforcement sensitive” and
distributed through the Department of Homeland Security’s fusion
centers. “Locations and times have been identified for these
protests, which are being distributed online across multiple social
media platforms, to include right-wing leaning Parler and Telegram
accounts.”
Did the Biden administration weaponize the United States Postal
Service to improperly spy on Americans who object to lockdown
policies? Judicial Watch, with your support, aims to get the truth.

After the new coronavirus emerged, on March 20, 2020, continuing on

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25287&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbmloLXd1aGFuLWp1bmUtMjAyMS0wMDY5Ni1wZ3MtMy02Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDcwOTIzNDczOA==],

The 2019 novel coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) outbreak is a major challenge
for global public health security. Infection with SARS-CoV-2 has been
associated with serious acute respiratory distress syndrome with large
number of patients’ hospitalization and relatively high mortality.
We had a very hard time in combating the infection in Wuhan, the
epicenter of the COVID-19 in China, and now we can see the situation
goes in good direction, with no reported confirmed case, no reported
suspected case in last two days here.

My colleagues and I have been working on characterization of
pathogens, antiviral screen, vaccine development, animal modeling
since the early January this year, and some progresses have been made.
I hope our understanding of the virus and the technology could be
valuable in the global fighting to the virus.

As I can see from the media, the virus is spreading in your country,
and more people are infected during the last days, and the situation
worries me a lot. I am confident that we could finally curb the
spreading of the virus with our joint effort, and our life will return
back to the normal soon. I do not know what I can do for you in the
special moment and I hope you could protect you and your family.
Kuhn tells Lane and Schmaljohn, “I know Zhiming for quite some time
and also met him personally in Wuhan twice ... He used to be
responsible for the BSL-4 there.”

Some of Kuhn, Lane and Schmaljohn’s follow-on comments about

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES DEFENSE DEPARTMENT OVER THE MISTREATMENT OF A WAR
HERO

Too often, Pentagon bureaucrats mistreat genuine war heroes.

Maj. Fred C. Galvin (USMC, Ret.), commander of an elite U.S. Marine
Corps Special Operations unit, was falsely accused of war crimes in
Afghanistan in 2007. He was fully exonerated in 2019 but was still
denied retroactive promotion to lieutenant colonel by the Marine Corps
in 2020 despite an otherwise exemplary service record.

We filed a lawsuit on his behalf against the Acting Secretary of the
Navy Thomas Darker and Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin. Our suit
alleges that the military violated the Administrative Procedure Act
and another statute in denying Maj. Galvin a promotion (_Maj. Fred
Galvin v Thomas Harker et al,_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25281&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21hai1mcmVkLWdhbHZpbi12LXRob21hcy1oYXJrZXItY29tcGxhaW50LTAxODEzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDcwOTIzNDczOA==]
(No. 1:21-cv-01813)).

On March 4, 2007, Galvin and 29 members of the Marine Special
Operations Company Foxtrot (Fox Company), the first combat unit of the
U.S. Marine Corps Forces Special Operations Command (MARSOC), passed
through the Afghan village of Bati Kot, near the Pakistan border, in a
six-vehicle convoy. A suicide bomber driving a fuel and
explosive-packed van approached the convoy at a high rate of speed.
The van detonated, then fighters on both sides of the road opened fire
on the convoy. Fox Company fought back and escaped, returning to their
base with only one minor casualty. The Afghan government, numerous
media outlets, and others falsely accused Maj. Galvin and the unit of
war crimes in responding to the attack, and even the U.S. military,
after a horribly flawed investigation, called for Galvin and six other
Marines be charged with dereliction of duty and negligent homicide.
Maj. Galvin was relieved of command, and Fox Company was redeployed
out of Afghanistan.

Maj. Galvin and Fox Company were eventually exonerated by a Court of
Inquiry that, in a historic finding
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25279&F=T&],
found the Marines acted properly and instead faulted both the Air
Force colonel who investigated the incidents and senior U.S. military
leadership. The Court of Inquiry also found that the Air Force
colonel's findings and conclusions ran counter to the weight of the
evidence and faulted senior U.S. leaders for being unable or unwilling
to respond appropriately to what was described as an “enemy
information operation.”

The Court of Inquiry also faulted senior U.S. leaders for failing to
stand by Maj. Galvin and Fox Company until competent evidence had been
gathered. According to the Court of Inquiry report, “The
redeployment of [Fox Company] was based, in large part, on
unsubstantiated allegations related to the 4 March 2007 incident. The
decision to re-deploy [Fox Company] was influenced by the high level
of command, media, and governmental attention focused on the 4 March
2007 incident.” A video
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25280&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1WbmxXT2lweTQycyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDcwOTIzNDczOA==]
produced in 2019
documents what happened to Galvin and Fox Company after the ambush and
how false charges ruined their reputations.

Galvin was due to be considered for promotion to lieutenant colonel in
August 2010, and although he was exceptionally well-qualified for
promotion as compared to his peers, the board did not select him for
promotion. Ultimately, he was forced to retire involuntarily from the
Marine Corps.

In 2019, a U.S. Navy panel ordered that adverse fitness reports in
Maj. Galvin’s service record regarding the 2007 ambush and a later
event, in which Maj. Galvin also was found to have acted entirely
appropriately, be removed from his service record. The panel also
ordered that a special selection board be convened to consider Maj.
Galvin for retroactive promotion to lieutenant colonel. The special
selection board denied Maj. Galvin promotion again, despite his having
an exceptional service record:

(Maj. Galvin) had served in several key leadership billets, a
significant marker for promotion. He had extensive combat experience
and had been “forward deployed” for more than three years, which
also are significant markers for promotion. He had received multiple
awards, including a Bronze Star with Combat V, and received glowing
comments recommending him for promotion. Plaintiff also had
completed his Professional Military Education promotion requirement by
attending the Marine Corps Command and Staff College and completing
the Intermediate Level School in 2008.
Maj. Galvin was never provided an explanation – a “rational
connection to the facts found and the choices made” – for why he
was not promoted.

The Pentagon’s continued refusal to promote Maj. Galvin is an
absolute disgrace. This American hero gave years of his life and his
good name to serve our country selflessly and has been denied a
well-deserved promotion because of anti-military politics, false
narratives, and the cynical choices of his superiors.

We are honored to go to court on behalf of Major Galvin, a brave
warrior and patriot who first and foremost acted to protect the lives
of the soldiers under his command.

though the council unanimously voted for it
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25322&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9mYXN0ZGVtb2NyYWN5LmNvbS9iaWxsLXNlYXJjaC9kYy8yNC9iaWxscy9EQ0IwMDAxNjQ1NS8jdm90ZXM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MDkyMzQ3Mzg=]
and
the mayor supports it. In fact, Mayor Muriel Bowser urged the D.C.
Council to pass
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25323&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9saW1zLmRjY291bmNpbC51cy9kb3dubG9hZHMvTElNUy80NzE4NC9JbnRyb2R1Y3Rpb24vUFIyNC0wMjM4LUludHJvZHVjdGlvbi5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MDkyMzQ3Mzg=]
the
resolution, known as PR 24-0238, approving the statue’s installation
on the public space adjacent to the museum in the historic Archibald
Grimke School at 1925 Vermont Avenue, NW.

In a May 14, 2021 letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25323&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9saW1zLmRjY291bmNpbC51cy9kb3dubG9hZHMvTElNUy80NzE4NC9JbnRyb2R1Y3Rpb24vUFIyNC0wMjM4LUludHJvZHVjdGlvbi5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MDkyMzQ3Mzg=]
to
D.C. Council Chairman Phil Mendelson, the mayor refers to the project
as “commemorative work” and writes that the Lincoln statue was
delivered in July 2020 and the museum has filed the necessary
paperwork to obtain a permit from the Department of Transportation to
install it. Bowser reveals the piece was designed to create a
sightline across Vermont Avenue from the Memorial to the Museum at
Grimke, which is currently under construction, and it will rest on a
podium adorned by ceremonial steps. “I urge the Council to take
prompt and favorable action on the enclosed resolution,” Bowser
writes, referring to the measure attached to her letter. On June 29,
the council passed it by a vote of 13-0.

Nevertheless, a special D.C. panel created to tackle racism,
the Council Office of Racial Equity
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25324&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGNyYWNpYWxlcXVpdHkub3JnL21pc3Npb24tdmlzaW9uLWFuZC12YWx1ZXM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MDkyMzQ3Mzg=]
(CORE),
has nixed the idea, writing in a report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25325&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvd3AtY29udGVudC91cGxvYWRzLzIwMjEvMDcvQ09SRUxpbmNvbG5SRUlBLnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDcwOTIzNDczOA==]
that
“Lincoln’s legacy has long been debated” and the statue will not
increase representation of communities of color. The five-page
document, officially called Racial Equity Impact Assessment
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25325&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvd3AtY29udGVudC91cGxvYWRzLzIwMjEvMDcvQ09SRUxpbmNvbG5SRUlBLnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDcwOTIzNDczOA==]
(REIA),
delves deeply into the supposed lack of diversity among statues and
commemorative works in D.C. and offers a simple conclusion involving
the new Lincoln fixture: “Although the overall impact on
residents’ lives will be minimal, PR24-0238 would contribute to
widening the racial inequity between the number of commemorative works
dedicated to white men and those dedicated to Black persons and other
persons of color in the District of Columbia.”

The CORE report seems to scold D.C. officials, stating that
“commemorative works should be intentional about who is being
honored, why they are being honored, and how that representation will
inspire future generations.” Under the large, bold heading of
“RACIAL EQUITY CONSIDERATIONS” the race council writes that there
are at least four statues and commemorative works honoring President
Lincoln’s legacy, “which has long been debated,” throughout D.C.
It singles out the Emancipation Memorial for being funded by
“formerly enslaved men and women” who had no say in the matter.
“There is a severe lack of diversity amongst statues and
commemorative works in the District of Columbia,” the CORE racial
equity assessment states. “In 2019, of at least 115 statues in DC,
just six were of American women and only one was of a Black woman,
that being Mary McLeod Bethune. Duke Ellington was the only Black
native Washingtonian with a statue dedicated in his honor.” Erecting
yet another statue of Lincoln underscores the need to close the
existing gap, the panel writes.

CORE was established this year as part of a broader measure
called Racial Equity Achieves Results Act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25326&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9rZW55YW5tY2R1ZmZpZXdhcmQ1LmNvbS9lcXVpdHkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzA5MjM0NzM4]
(REACH) enacted to
establish a racial equity framework across the entire D.C. government.
REACH requires mandatory racial equity training for D.C. government
employees, the creation of a Commission on Racial Equity, Social
Justice, and Economic Inclusion as well as racial equity impact
assessment on certain council measures. The law also requires the
mayor to include racial equity performance measures in the development
of an agency’s annual performance plans and creates a racial equity
tool to help all D.C. agencies incorporate racial equity into their
operations, performance-based budgets, programs, policies, rules and
regulations.

CORE is tasked with eliminating racial disparities and achieving
racial equity by determining if proposed D.C. laws and policies
advance racial equity or increase racial inequity. The panel
accomplishes this by conducting a REIA like the one completed for the
new Lincoln statue. REIA is described on the agency’s website
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56151&L=25327&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGNyYWNpYWxlcXVpdHkub3JnL3JhY2lhbC1lcXVpdHktaW1wYWN0LWFzc2Vzc21lbnRzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzA5MjM0NzM4]
as
the careful and organized examination of how different racial and
ethnic groups will likely be affected by a proposed bill or
resolution. “A REIA can help prevent institutional racism,
deconstruct structurally racist policies, and identify historic and
structural causes of long-standing racial inequities,” according to
CORE.
Until next week ...
